programme.title: Labākais manī
programme.desc: Lai gan Amanda un Davsons nāk no dažādiem sociālajiem slāņiem, viņu mīlasstāsts, kurš sācies jau pusaudžu vecumā, ir pierādījums tam, ka dvēseļu radinieki eksistē. Kāds negadījums jauniešus izšķir. Paiet teju 20 gadi, kad nejaušība viņus atkal saved kopā. Amanda ir nelaimīgi precējusies un sirds dziļumos joprojām nespēj piedot Davsonam, ka viņš no viņas reiz atteicies, tomēr skaidrs ir viens - intensīvās jūtas, kas piedzīvotas jaunībā, nav mazinājušās, bet tikai pieņēmušās spēkā. Vai dvēseles radiniekiem liktenis lēmis būt kopā?

programme.title: Aiz kraujas rudzu laukā
programme.desc: "Aiz kraujas rudzu laukā" ir ieskats notikumos, kas veidoja vienu no pretrunīgākajiem un noslēpumainākajiem amerikāņu rakstniekiem – Dž. D. Selindžeru. Filmas darbība risinās 20. gadsimta vidū Ņujorkā, kad jaunais Selindžers meklē savu vietu dzīvē. Pārciestais frontē 2. Pasaules karā, mīlas dēka ar augstāko aprindu jaunkundzi Ūnu O'Nīlu un pirmie literārie centieni – šī pieredze ir pamatā viņa pasaulē, iespējams, slavenākajam literārajam meistardarbam "Uz kraujas rudzu laukā". Galvenās lomas atveido jaunais britu aktieris Nikolass Holts un sevi jau pierādījušais ASV kino meistars Kevins Speisijs.

programme.title: Būt par Flinnu
programme.desc: Strādājot Bostonas bezpajumtnieku patversmē, Niks Flinns sastapies ar savu tēvu - krāpnieku un pašpasludinātu rakstnieku. Jūtot problēmas paša dzīvē, Niks nolemj no jauna uzmeklēt savu radinieku.

programme.title: Labākais manī
programme.desc: Lai gan Amanda un Davsons nāk no dažādiem sociālajiem slāņiem, viņu mīlasstāsts, kurš sācies jau pusaudžu vecumā, ir pierādījums tam, ka dvēseļu radinieki eksistē. Kāds negadījums jauniešus izšķir. Paiet teju 20 gadi, kad nejaušība viņus atkal saved kopā. Amanda ir nelaimīgi precējusies un sirds dziļumos joprojām nespēj piedot Davsonam, ka viņš no viņas reiz atteicies, tomēr skaidrs ir viens - intensīvās jūtas, kas piedzīvotas jaunībā, nav mazinājušās, bet tikai pieņēmušās spēkā. Vai dvēseles radiniekiem liktenis lēmis būt kopā?

programme.title: Būt par Flinnu
programme.desc: Strādājot Bostonas bezpajumtnieku patversmē, Niks Flinns sastapies ar savu tēvu - krāpnieku un pašpasludinātu rakstnieku. Jūtot problēmas paša dzīvē, Niks nolemj no jauna uzmeklēt savu radinieku.

programme.title: Aiz kraujas rudzu laukā
programme.desc: "Aiz kraujas rudzu laukā" ir ieskats notikumos, kas veidoja vienu no pretrunīgākajiem un noslēpumainākajiem amerikāņu rakstniekiem – Dž. D. Selindžeru. Filmas darbība risinās 20. gadsimta vidū Ņujorkā, kad jaunais Selindžers meklē savu vietu dzīvē. Pārciestais frontē 2. Pasaules karā, mīlas dēka ar augstāko aprindu jaunkundzi Ūnu O'Nīlu un pirmie literārie centieni – šī pieredze ir pamatā viņa pasaulē, iespējams, slavenākajam literārajam meistardarbam "Uz kraujas rudzu laukā". Galvenās lomas atveido jaunais britu aktieris Nikolass Holts un sevi jau pierādījušais ASV kino meistars Kevins Speisijs.

programme.title: Pingvīnu mācības
programme.desc: Vīlies anglis, kurš 1976. gadā dodas strādāt skolā sadalītajā Argentīnā, atklāj, ka viņa dzīve mainās, kad viņš no pludmales izglābj pingvīnu bāreni.

programme.title: Pussagrūšana
programme.desc: Pēc vīra nāves Hanna mēģina turpināt dzīvi. Viņa raksta grāmatu par savu vīru, kurš bijis populārs mūziķis, kad negaidīti viņas dzīvē uzrodas pašpārliecināts rakstnieks Endrjū no Ņujorkas, kuram ir cits skatījums uz Hannas vīra dzīvi un arī nāvi. Abu iepazīšanās nesākas uz tās patīkamākās nots, taču kas zina - kā izvērsīsies. Galvenajās lomās: Rebeka Hola, Džeisons Sudeikis, Blaita Danere

programme.title: Altamira
programme.desc: Dzīve un notikumi kāda vīrieša ikdienā, atklājot vienu no 19. gadsimta būtiskākajiem atklājumiem - Altamiras alas.

programme.title: Pingvīnu mācības
programme.desc: Vīlies anglis, kurš 1976. gadā dodas strādāt skolā sadalītajā Argentīnā, atklāj, ka viņa dzīve mainās, kad viņš no pludmales izglābj pingvīnu bāreni.

programme.title: Kas skatāms Filmzone Plus?
programme.desc: Iepazīstinām ar Filmzone Plus filmām.

programme.title: Alex Vs America
programme.desc: Brave and talented chefs attempt to take down Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli, the most feared and accomplished competition cook in America. Chef Alex goes up against three chefs in two rounds of cooking, and anyone -- even Alex -- can be sent home after a blind tasting by the judges. Each chef hails from a different state, but they all share the same culinary specialty and drive to beat Alex for ultimate bragging rights and $15,000.

programme.title: Best Bite In Town
programme.desc: Noah Cappe, Aarti Sequeira and Joe Sasto to explore Italian and Caribbean cuisine, banh mi, delicatessen fare and elevated cowboy cooking in Tulsa, Oklahoma.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Take one sassy former city girl, her hunky rancher husband and a band of adorable kids, an extended family, cowboys, 3000 wild mustangs, a herd of cattle and one placid basset hound and you have The Pioneer Woman. The Pioneer Woman is an open invitation into Ree Drummond's life: The award-winning blogger and best-selling cookbook author comes to Food Network and shares her special brand of home cooking, from throw-together suppers to elegant celebrations. The series, set against the incredible story of life at home on the range, is the next best thing to actually sitting on a stool in Ree's kitchen.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Take one sassy former city girl, her hunky rancher husband and a band of adorable kids, an extended family, cowboys, 3000 wild mustangs, a herd of cattle and one placid basset hound and you have The Pioneer Woman. The Pioneer Woman is an open invitation into Ree Drummond's life: The award-winning blogger and best-selling cookbook author comes to Food Network and shares her special brand of home cooking, from throw-together suppers to elegant celebrations. The series, set against the incredible story of life at home on the range, is the next best thing to actually sitting on a stool in Ree's kitchen.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Chopped is an American reality cooking TV game show hosted by Ted Allen. Four chefs compete against each other. At the beginning of each round they receive a basket containing four mystery ingredients and are expected to create the best three-course meal using every single one of them. Each round has a time limit. The dishes are judged based on their presentation, taste and creativity. At the end of every round one chef is "chopped" from the competition with no prize. The winner can get up to $50.000.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: After combating countless "impossible dinners," Chef Robert Irvine faces a daunting new challenge: save America's most desperate restaurants from impending failure in just two days with only $10,000. In his new prime-time Food Network series, Restaurant: Impossible, Robert uses creativity and resourcefulness along with a lot of muscle in his fight to rescue these restaurants and give hope to the owners and their employees. Day one of the extreme mission begins with a thorough business assessment as Robert launches the restaurant into full service, closely observes the staff and kitchen, and determines their weakest spots. Then, he springs into action by updating the menu, retraining the staff and implementing aesthetic changes with the help of his design team. To ensure a packed house for the grand re-opening at the end of day two, Robert hits the streets to tell the community about the improved restaurant. Will the ruthless schedule, tight budget and ambitious task overcome Robert's lofty goals, or will this tall order result in restaurant triumph?

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives is American food reality television series about places with the most delicious food. The host is American restaurateur Guy Fieri who travels along the USA, Canada or Europe looking for the most fascinating cafes and introduces them to the viewers. Each show has a specific focus on a certain dish, like burgers, pasta, comfort food. Small cafes with traditional food and home-style recipes or ethnic specialties adored by the locals are of particular interest to the host. Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Two talented chefs go head-to-head for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay. To get to Bobby the chefs must first face off against each other, creating a spectacular dish with a secret ingredient of Bobby's choice. Judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Jeff Mauro know Bobby's strengths and his weaknesses. Their goal: Pick the chef who has the skills to take down Bobby Flay in his own arena. The winning chef gets to challenge Bobby with his or her surprise signature dish. If Bobby goes down, the winner can tell the world, "I beat Bobby Flay!"

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Network's series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Bobby's Triple Threat
programme.desc: Features one competitor per episode who enters Bobby's secret kitchen to compete against professional chefs in three head-to-head rounds. If the competitor can out-cook the titans and earn more points, they take home the cash prize.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Network's series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is a cookbook author who combines her country lifestyle with her Jewish and Chinese heritage to create the most delicious new dishes. A former big city girl, Yeh is multi talented, a successful blogger and classically trained musician, its food that ultimately stole her heart. Learn lots of tricks and tips with Yeh as she cooks up her personal favourite recipes for every occasion, from family visits to brunch with the girls to a classic farm supper! This show is an absolute treat.

programme.title: Flavortown Food Fight
programme.desc: Angelo Sosa, Kayla Pfeiffer, and Trimell Hawkins kick off the competition for a chance to win up to $20,000 and continue their run through Flavortown.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Network's series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. programme.title: Bizarre Foods
programme.desc: Travel and cuisine documentary series, hosted by famous Andrew Zimmern, American culinary expert, chef, restaurateur and television personality and spin-off series of ''Bizarre Foods'', focuses on classic, iconic foods (not bizarre like in the original series) from some well-known destinations- moussaka and real Greek yogurt from Athens, sweet macarons and crepes from Paris, Italian gelato, gooey fondue to Swiss chocolate from Zurich, mile-high pastrami sandwiches and bagels from NYC, and many other legendary foods. The show will explore where these dishes came from, how they're prepared, and the best way to enjoy them. Andrew will also discover some secrets and interesting stories behind these epic meals.

Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Two talented chefs go head-to-head for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay. To get to Bobby the chefs must first face off against each other, creating a spectacular dish with a secret ingredient of Bobby's choice. Judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Jeff Mauro know Bobby's strengths and his weaknesses. Their goal: Pick the chef who has the skills to take down Bobby Flay in his own arena. The winning chef gets to challenge Bobby with his or her surprise signature dish. If Bobby goes down, the winner can tell the world, "I beat Bobby Flay!"

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Chopped is an American reality cooking TV game show hosted by Ted Allen. Four chefs compete against each other. At the beginning of each round they receive a basket containing four mystery ingredients and are expected to create the best three-course meal using every single one of them. Each round has a time limit. The dishes are judged based on their presentation, taste and creativity. At the end of every round one chef is "chopped" from the competition with no prize. The winner can get up to $50.000.

programme.title: Flavortown Food Fight
programme.desc: Angelo Sosa, Kayla Pfeiffer, and Trimell Hawkins kick off the competition for a chance to win up to $20,000 and continue their run through Flavortown.

programme.title: Bobby's Triple Threat
programme.desc: Features one competitor per episode who enters Bobby's secret kitchen to compete against professional chefs in three head-to-head rounds. If the competitor can out-cook the titans and earn more points, they take home the cash prize.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Network's series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is a cookbook author who combines her country lifestyle with her Jewish and Chinese heritage to create the most delicious new dishes. A former big city girl, Yeh is multi talented, a successful blogger and classically trained musician, its food that ultimately stole her heart. Learn lots of tricks and tips with Yeh as she cooks up her personal favourite recipes for every occasion, from family visits to brunch with the girls to a classic farm supper! This show is an absolute treat.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm

This show is an absolute treat.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Take one sassy former city girl, her hunky rancher husband and a band of adorable kids, an extended family, cowboys, 3000 wild mustangs, a herd of cattle and one placid basset hound and you have The Pioneer Woman. The Pioneer Woman is an open invitation into Ree Drummond's life: The award-winning blogger and best-selling cookbook author comes to Food Network and shares her special brand of home cooking, from throw-together suppers to elegant celebrations. The series, set against the incredible story of life at home on the range, is the next best thing to actually sitting on a stool in Ree's kitchen.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Take one sassy former city girl, her hunky rancher husband and a band of adorable kids, an extended family, cowboys, 3000 wild mustangs, a herd of cattle and one placid basset hound and you have The Pioneer Woman. programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Chopped is an American reality cooking TV game show hosted by Ted Allen. Four chefs compete against each other. Each round has a time limit. The dishes are judged based on their presentation, taste and creativity. At the end of every round one chef is "chopped" from the competition with no prize. The winner can get up to $50.000.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: After combating countless "impossible dinners," Chef Robert Irvine faces a daunting new challenge: save America's most desperate restaurants from impending failure in just two days with only $10,000. In his new prime-time Food Network series, Restaurant: Impossible, Robert uses creativity and resourcefulness along with a lot of muscle in his fight to rescue these restaurants and give hope to the owners and their employees. Day one of the extreme mission begins with a thorough business assessment as Robert launches the restaurant into full service, closely observes the staff and kitchen, and determines their weakest spots. Then, he springs into action by updating the menu, retraining the staff and implementing aesthetic changes with the help of his design team. To ensure a packed house for the grand re-opening at the end of day two, Robert hits the streets to tell the community about the improved restaurant. Will the ruthless schedule, tight budget and ambitious task overcome Robert's lofty goals, or will this tall order result in restaurant triumph?

programme.title: Giada at Home
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis is an outstanding culinary specialist, the author of nine New York Times bestselling cookbooks, Emmy award winning television personality and the host of Giada at Home television show. Giada has quite an impressive background of culinary training from Le Cordon Bleu in Paris, which combined with her own unique Californian charm creates her one-of-a-kind recognizable style. In Giada at Home she focuses on cooking at home for friends and family for different occasions and on party planning. Holiday feast or romantic dinner, weekend vibes or average day, it does not matter- the food is always delicious.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Simple Pleasures
programme.desc: Rachel Khoo's Simple Pleasure is a brand-new Food Network series that follows chef, writer and broadcaster Rachel Khoo as she makes a range of mouth-watering dishes that she loves to cook at home. Bringing all her usual flair and style, Rachel confidently and creatively transforms seemingly ordinary, easy-to-find ingredients into extraordinary meals and draws out the joy that can be found in simple, tasty home cooking.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods
programme.desc: Travel and cuisine documentary series, hosted by famous Andrew Zimmern, American culinary expert, chef, restaurateur and television personality and spin-off series of ''Bizarre Foods'', focuses on classic, iconic foods (not bizarre like in the original series) from some well-known destinations- moussaka and real Greek yogurt from Athens, sweet macarons and crepes from Paris, Italian gelato, gooey fondue to Swiss chocolate from Zurich, mile-high pastrami sandwiches and bagels from NYC, and many other legendary foods. The show will explore where these dishes came from, how they're prepared, and the best way to enjoy them. Andrew will also discover some secrets and interesting stories behind these epic meals.

programme.title: News reports
programme.desc: The program delivers comprehensive reports on current events, providing viewers with detailed information on politics, society, economy, and culture. Episodes present facts clearly and objectively, offering analysis and context to help audiences understand complex issues. By following the program, viewers stay informed about local and global developments, gain insight into ongoing events, and make sense of important news with accuracy and reliability.

programme.title: SBU. The Special Operations. The Victories
programme.desc: Audiences are taken behind the scenes of special operations conducted by the Security Service of Ukraine, exploring detailed accounts of missions, planning, and execution. Each episode highlights tactical successes, teamwork, and the challenges faced during operations. Through real examples and analysis, viewers gain a deeper understanding of strategic decisions, operational planning, and the crucial role these missions play in maintaining national security and protecting citizens.

programme.title: SBU. The Special Operations. The Victories
programme.desc: Audiences are taken behind the scenes of special operations conducted by the Security Service of Ukraine, exploring detailed accounts of missions, planning, and execution. Each episode highlights tactical successes, teamwork, and the challenges faced during operations. Through real examples and analysis, viewers gain a deeper understanding of strategic decisions, operational planning, and the crucial role these missions play in maintaining national security and protecting citizens.

programme.title: Treasures of the Nation
programme.desc: Audiences are taken on a journey to uncover Ukraine's most remarkable treasures, ranging from ancient artifacts and historical relics to significant cultural landmarks. The program emphasizes preservation, discovery, and national pride, offering viewers an in-depth understanding of Ukraine's rich heritage and the efforts to protect and celebrate it.

programme.title: Yabluska Street
programme.desc: Yablunska Street " explores the tragedy of Bucha through the history of its "road of death", which became the epicenter of Russian atrocities and a symbol of the genocide of the Ukrainian people. The film is based on the testimonies of residents who survived the occupation, including those who miraculously survived executions and torture. The film documents in detail the consequences of the Bucha massacre, where on one street alone the occupiers massively killed civilians - from children to the elderly (in total, 637 victims were found in the city). The journalists managed not only to record the confessions of eyewitnesses, but also to conduct an investigation to establish the names of the dead and identify the war criminals responsible for these terrible murders.

programme.title: By the Kremlin's Law
programme.desc: Offering a deeper look at how political authority permeates everyday life, this film explores the impact of Kremlin laws on society. "By the Kremlin's Law" portrays the challenges individuals face, the pressure created by the system, and the struggle to endure within it. Through real-life examples, it delivers a powerful narrative of the balance between power, control, and resistance.

programme.title: Historical Facts
programme.desc: Viewers are taken on a journey through history, uncovering fascinating events, influential personalities, and cultural achievements that shaped societies across the globe. Each episode presents detailed accounts, contextual explanations, and intriguing facts, allowing audiences to explore the past in depth. The program encourages curiosity, enhances historical knowledge, and offers a richer perspective on how past events continue to influence the present and future.

programme.title: The Last Day of the Dictator
programme.desc: The program delves deeply into the last days of a dictator's rule, examining political conflicts, social unrest, and decisive moments that led to the fall of authority. Episodes provide detailed narratives of government decisions, protests, and personal accounts, offering viewers insight into the human, political, and societal consequences of authoritarian regimes. By exploring these events, audiences gain a comprehensive understanding of power, resistance, and the dramatic processes that shape history.

programme.title: BlackBerry
programme.desc: Stāsts par pasaules pirmā viedtālruņa galvu reibinošajiem panākumiem un katastrofālo kritienu.

programme.title: Kā apmierināt sievieti
programme.desc: Kad Džīna zaudē kontroli pār savu tīrīšanas biznesu, kurā nodarbināti tikai vīrieši, viņai jāpieņem pašai sava seksualitāte, ja vēlas uzsākt jaunu dzīvi.

programme.title: Mēs visi svešinieki
programme.desc: Šajā aizkustinošajā, provokatīvajā stāstā par mīlestību, ģimeni un pagātnes rēgiem Ādams dzīvo vientuļu dzīvi, taču kādu vakaru viņu apciemo noslēpumains kaimiņš, kurš uzjundī sen apspiestas jūtas un atmiņas. Abu starpā rodas saikne un nenoliedzamas simpātijas, un Ādams nonāk savā bērnības mājā, kurā 30 gadus pēc nāves šķietami dzīvo viņa vecāki.

programme.title: Brāļi Sisteri
programme.desc: Pārgalvīgie brāļi ar dīvainajiem uzvārdiem ir zeltrača un avantūrista Vorma meklējumos - šo uzdevumu viņi ir saņēmuši no noslēpumainā Komandora. Būdami atlīdzības mednieki, dzenoties pakaļ savam jaunajam upurim, viņi pat nenojauš, ka ir iepinušies bīstamā spēlē, kurā savus neapvaldāmos raksturus būs jāapvieno ar asu prātu un prasmi rīkoties ar ieroci.

programme.title: Meitene vārdā Vilo
programme.desc: Vilo manto mežu, māju un burvju spējas no savas vecmāmiņas Alvinas. Viņai jāatrod vēl trīs meitenes ar maģiskām dāvanām, lai izglābtu mežu. Par laimi, viņai līdzās ir lapsa Rufuss.

programme.title: Mīlestība dejas ritmā
programme.desc: Talantīgā balerīna Bārlova nolēmusi īstenot savu sapni Amerikas mākslas svētnīcā Ņujorkā. Diemžēl iepazīšanās ar svētnīcas realitāti nav īpaši patīkama – pieredzējusī baleta pasniedzēja Oksana skaidri un gaiši pasaka: Bārlova vēl nav ne tuvu pilnībai. Norijusi krupi, meitene nepadodas un piedalās jaunas Brodvejas deju izrādes atlasē. Režisors Zanders pievērš uzmanību Bārlovai un izvēlas viņu mēģinājumiem. Pēc dažām dienām topošās izrādes kodolam pievienojas talantīgais pianists Čārlijs. Tāpat kā Bārlova, viņš ieradies Ņujorkā, lai īstenotu sapni. Puisim un meitenei rodas simpātijas vienam pret otru, bet Zanders nav vienaldzīgs pret meiteni. Bārlova drīz vien sapinas mīlas trīsstūrī. Izrādes mēģinājumi kļūst arvien intensīvāki, slodze aug, un ne Bārlovai, ne Čārlijam neatliek laika nekam citam. Darbs vaiga sviedros, nemitīgā spriedze, sāncenšu nodevība un cīņa bez kompromisiem prasa visus spēkus.

programme.title: Heidija un mazais lūsēns
programme.desc: Kad enerģiskā, astoņus gadus vecā Heidija izglābj lūsēnu no alkatīga biznesmeņa, kurš apdraud viņu mītni kalnos, viņa atklāj sava vectēva apslēpto pagātni un uzzina, ka īsta piederība nozīmē aizsargāt gan ģimeni, gan savvaļu, ko viņi sauc par mājām.

programme.title: Lielās sacīkstes cauri Eiropai
programme.desc: Eda, jauna pele ar lieliem sapņiem, izmanto iespēju piedalīties sacīkstēs "Grand Prix", pārģērbusies par savu varoni Edu. Viņa stājas pretī sāncenses sabotāžai un pierāda, ka pat vismazākais braucējs var atstāt vislielāko iespaidu.

programme.title: Rūķi
programme.desc: Hloja un viņas mamma pārvācas – jau ATKAL! Turklāt viņas pārvācas uz necilu, vecu māju, kas pilna ar dārza rūķiem. Drīz Hloja gan atklāj, ka šī māja slēpj biedējošu noslēpumu. Kādu dienu pēc skolas Hloja kopā ar kaimiņu Liamu atklāj, ka rūķi patiesībā ir dzīvi! Kā izrādās, jau gadiem rūķi ir sargājuši planētu no draudīgiem maziem monstriem, kuri iebrukuši mājā caur portālu, kas ved uz citu pasauli. Kad vienīgais līdzeklis, kas varētu palīdzēt uzveikt monstrus, skolā nonāk nepareizajās rokās, Hlojai un Liamam jāsadarbojas ar rūķiem, lai cīnītos pret mazo negantnieku iebrukumu un glābtu pasauli!

programme.title: Terra Villijs - planēta nezināmais
programme.desc: Kad kosmosa kuģis cieš avāriju un Villijs tiek nošķirts no saviem vecākiem, viņš nokļūst uz mežonīgas un neizpētītas planētas, kur ar izdzīvošanas robota Baka palīdzību būs jānoturas, līdz ieradīsies glābšanas komanda.

programme.title: Kaut tu būtu šeit
programme.desc: Jauna dāma, meklējot dzīvei uguntiņu, pavada romantisku nakti kopā ar kādu jaunekli. Atklādama, ka vīrietis ir nedziedināmi slims, sieviete apņemas palīdzēt viņam pilnvērtīgi nodzīvot pēdējās šeit atvēlētās dienas.

programme.title: Viņš ir viņa
programme.desc: Ļoti brīva Šekspīra lugas "Divpadsmitā nakts" ekranizācija. Pārvācoties uz citu skolu, Viola maina arī savu izskatu un uzdodas par savu dvīņubrāli Sebastjanu, kurš pats pārcēlies uz Londonu. Taču meitene nemaz nenojauš, ka viņu gaida pārsteigums, – viņa iemīlēsies savā istabas biedrā un skolas karstākajā puisī Djūkā, kura sirds savukārt pieder skaistulei Olīvijai. Taču šī meitene ir pamanījusi Sebastjanu – emocionālo puisi, kādi viņai vienmēr patikuši. Un, kaut arī šķiet, ka nekas nevar būt vēl trakāk, ierodas īstais Sebastjans, kurš nemaz nenojauš, ka viņu aizvieto paša dvīņu māsa!

programme.title: Kā pieradināt pūķi
programme.desc: Vikingu pusaudzis Hikaps dzīvo Berkas salā kopā ar savu valdonīgo tēvu. Kaujas ar pūķiem ir vikingu ikdiena un dzīves veids, taču Hikapu tās neaizrauj. Tā vietā viņš labprātāk nododas visvisādiem izgudrojumiem un apkārtnes iepazīšanai. Reiz kādā no saviem klejojumiem Hikaps sastop ievainotu pūķi, kuram palīdz atkal lidot. Šī sastapšanās maina abu dzīves. Un, kad pienāk iesvētību laiks – lielā iespēja kaujā ar pūķiem sevi pierādīt tēvam un visai ciltij –, Hikaps rīkojas pavisam neparasti.

programme.title: Titāniks
programme.desc: Savā pirmajā braucienā dodas pasaules lielākais kuģis "Titāniks". Uz kuģa klāja tūkstošiem cilvēku ar cerībām un bailēm gaida nokļūšanu galamērķī – Amerikā. Starp šiem cilvēkiem ir nabadzīgs mākslinieks Džeks, kā arī septiņpadsmit gadus vecā Roza – skaista un bagāta meitene, kurai apnikusi vecāku ārišķīgā un liekulīgā pasaule. "Titānika" būvētāji ir pārliecināti par to, ka kuģi nav iespējams nogremdēt, taču, kad kuģa ceļā gadās milzīgs aisbergs, Rozas un Džeka romantiskais piedzīvojums pārvēršas cīņā par izdzīvošanu.

programme.title: Alarum
programme.desc: Silvestrs Stallone – spiegu trillerī. Precēts spiegu pāris slēpjas no varas iestādēm, kas meklē pazudušu cieto disku.

programme.title: After. Uz visiem laikiem
programme.desc: Pēc šķiršanās no savas dzīves patiesās mīlestības bestselleru autors Hardins Skots ceļo uz Portugāli, lai izlīdzinātu savus pagātnes nodarījumus.

programme.title: Mīluļu slepenā dzīve
programme.desc: Makss (Luiss Sīkejs) ir enerģisks un sajūsmināts Džeka Rasela terjers, kurš dzīvo Manhetenas dzīvoklī kopā ar īpašnieci Keitiju (Elija Kempere). Taču viņa laimīgā dzīve pārtrūkst, kad saimniece pieņem jaunu suni Grāfu (Ēriks Stounstrīts). Makss apņemas atgūt saimnieces uzmanību tikai sev un mēģina Grāfu atstāt kādā sānielā, taču viņus ielenc kaķu banda, kuru vada Ozons (Stīvs Kūgans). Viņi tik tikko izglābj savas dzīvības, kad nākas saskarties ar pamesto dzīvnieku armijas niknumu apburošā, bet psihiski nelīdzsvarotā truša Sniegapikas (Kevins Hārts) vadībā. Šis ir Ņujorkas piedzīvojums, kurš liek Maksam un Grāfam izvērtēt savu sacensību un mēģināt izjaukt Sniegapikas atriebes plānu pret visiem dzīvnieku īpašniekiem Ņujorkā.

programme.title: Misija: Izglābt tīģeri
programme.desc: Jauns supervaronis iedraudzējas ar apdraudētu tīģeri, ko sastapis piknika laikā mežā, un uzsāk drosmīgu glābšanas misiju.

programme.title: Krūdi
programme.desc: Aizvēsturiska piedzīvojumu komēdija par pasaules pirmo ģimeni, kura dodas unikālā ceļojumā, kad viņu dzimtā ala tiek iznīcināta. Ceļojot pa elpu aizraujošajām ainavām, Krūdi atklāj pasakainu, jaunu vietu, kur mīt vēl neredzētas būtnes. Viņu pasaules uztvere mainās uz visiem laikiem.

programme.title: Viens pats mājās
programme.desc: Iepriekšējos Ziemassvētkos, dodoties brīvdienās uz Franciju, Makkalisteri aizmirsa mājās savu jaunāko atvasi Kevinu. Šogad, dodoties uz Floridu, viņi dēlu pazaudē lidostā. Kamēr ģimene lido uz Maiami, Kevins ar tēva kredītkartēm kabatā ir ceļā uz Ņujorku. Lielajā pilsētā viņš atrod jaunus draugus, iekārtojas lepnākajā viesnīcā un sastop arī savus vecos paziņas – divus aprobežotos kramplaužus. Šoreiz abi ļaundari Ziemassvētku vakarā plāno apzagt lielāko rotaļlietu veikalu Ņujorkā. Turklāt viņi jau sen alkst atriebties Kevinam – zēnam, kura dēļ nonāca cietumā.

programme.title: Dogmens
programme.desc: Kad uzticīgais policijas suns un viņa saimnieks dežūras laikā gūst ievainojumus, ārsti paveic dzīvību glābjošu operāciju, un no viņiem abiem top viens - atjautīgais Dogmens! Viņš dod svinīgo policista zvērestu aizsargāt un kalpot. Tikko Dogmens sāk pildīt policista uzdevumus un cenšas atstāt labu iespaidu uz priekšnieku, viņam tiek sarežģīts uzdevums - jāaptur superļaundara kaķa Pītija varenais plāns.

programme.title: Kapteinis Zobenzobs un burvju briljants
programme.desc: Ļaunais princis Megans Hans no džungļiem un Karību jūras pirāts kapteinis Zobenzobs jau sen dzen maģiskā briljanta pēdas. Tas nav parasts dārgakmens. Pusnaktī tas spēj piepildīt viskvēlāko vēlēšanos, lai kāda tā būtu. Visi meklējumi "kaķim zem astes", taču tad, klejodams pa džungļiem, burvju dārgakmeni nejauši ierauga mazais Marks.

programme.title: Tusnīte
programme.desc: Trīs draudzeņu vidū Bjanka ir visatšķirīgākā – gandrīz neredzama. Pasniedzēji neatceras viņas vārdu, un skolasbiedri – nesveicina. Bjankai pašai liekas, ka viss ir kārtībā, bet bērnības draugs skolas smukulītis Vess atklāj, kāds ir meitenes patiesais statuss nežēlīgajā skolas hierarhijā. Pateicoties puisim, Bjanka nolemj mainīt dzīvi. Taču meitenes apņemšanos apdraud skolas skaistule Medisona, kuras nākotnes plānos ietilpst dalība kādā realitātes šovā, tāpēc jau laikus viņa iejūtas lomā, katru savas ikdienas soli dokumentējot ar mobilo telefonu un sociālajos tīklos audzējot "biezu ādu". Viņasprāt, tikai nejauks cilvēks var sasniegt panākumus.

programme.title: Rūķi atgriežas atkal
programme.desc: Helvijas pasaule sagriežas kājām gaisā, kad viņa atklāj, ka pastāv tehniski attīstītu rūķu banda no Vīnes, kas, pretstatā Helvijas klanam, ir nepārspējami jautrības un piedzīvojumu meklētāji. Vai Helvijas draudzība ar Bo, jaunāko no rūķu bandas, spēs samierināt abus rūķu klanus pēc vairāk nekā 250 gadu pārtraukuma?

programme.title: Ja es spētu izstāstīt
programme.desc: Denijs Svifts ir pirmās formulas sacīkšu braucējs, taču bez autosporta viņš dievina arī savu skaisto sievu, mazo meitiņu un labāko draugu suni Enzo, kurš nākamajā dzīvē vēlas pārdzimt kā cilvēks. Suņu mīļotāji allaž uzskata, ka viņu suņi ir pilntiesīgi ģimenes locekļi, kuri spēj saprast cilvēku sacīto, izprot notikumus un ir uzticami līdz savai pēdējai stundiņai. Un nudien - tieši tāds suns ir Enzo. Viņa ikdiena lielākoties aizrit, skatoties televīziju un apgūstot visu iespējamo par sava īpašnieka lielāko aizraušanos - braukšanu ar sacīkšu auto. Viņš piedzīvo gan Denija laulības, gan viņu meitas Zojas piedzimšanu. Savas spēcīgās ožas dēļ viņš ir arī pirmais, kurš saprot, ka Denija sievai attīstās smadzeņu vēzis...

programme.title: Vilks un Lauva
programme.desc: Pēc vectēva nāves 20 gadus vecā pianiste Alma atgriežas bērnības mājās. Drīz viņas dzīvē notiek negaidīts pavērsiens. Nez no kurienes uzradusies vectēva draudzene baltā vilcene atved savu mazuli un pati nozūd. Tad netālu avarē lidmašīna, un meitene tās atlūzās atrod brīnumainā kārtā izdzīvojušu lauvēnu. Alma nolemj abus paturēt, un notiek neticamais – mazuļi kopā aug un iemīl viens otru kā brāļus. Bet idilliskā pasaule sabrūk, kad viņu noslēpums nāk gaismā.

programme.title: Bridžita Džounsa 2. Saprāta robeža
programme.desc: Bridžita Džonsa ir kā apreibusi no attiecībām ar Marku Dārsiju. Viņš ir izglītots, gādīgs un arī iecietīgs pret katru (gandrīz) Bridžitas greizsirdības lēkmi. Kādēļ gan lai ikviena Londonas sieviete nekristu kārdinājumā atņemt Marku tuklajai, ietiepīgajai un dažreiz nepiedienīgajai Bridžitai? Kad pie apvāršņa parādās garkājaina asistente, rozā mākonītis virs Bridžitas galvas savelkas aizdomīgi pelēks, un viņa ar skubu metas pārbaudīt abu attiecības. Taču, kad Bridžitai šķiet, ka sliktāk vairs nevar būt, parādās viņas bijušais priekšnieks, brunču mednieks un siržu lauzējs Daniels Klīvers.

programme.title: Eņģeļa krišana
programme.desc: Maiks Benings pilnībā nododas valsts dienestam, viņa galvenais uzdevums – gādāt par ASV prezidenta drošību. Kolēģi, ar kuriem Benings daudzus gadus strādājis plecu pie pleca, viņam neuzticas, tur viņu aizdomās par nodomu nonāvēt valsts galvu. Lai glābtu ne vien savu godu, bet arī dzīvību, Benings ir spiests slēpties un noskaidrot, kas un kāpēc ievilina viņu un prezidentu slazdā.

programme.title: Nerunā ļaunu
programme.desc: Kad amerikāņu ģimene tiek uzaicināta pavadīt nedēļas nogali idilliskā lauku īpašumā, kas pieder jaukai britu ģimenei, ar ko viņi iepazinās atvaļinājumā, viss sākas kā bezrūpīgas sapņu brīvdienas un drīz pārvēršas urdošā psiholoģiskā murgā.

programme.title: Mazgā mani upē
programme.desc: Narkomāni Šelbijs un viņa draudzene Rūbija cenšas atbrīvoties no atkarības un iet cauri ellei. Rūbija ir gandrīz atkopusies, kad viņu uzrunā sīks noziedznieks, kurš iedod viņai narkotikas, jo nevēlas zaudēt klientu. Atgriezusues mājās, Rūbija padodas atkarībai un injicē sev nāvējošu devu. Satriektais Šelbijs nolemj atriebties par mīļotās traģisko nāvi.

programme.title: Nezvēri
programme.desc: No dzimtenes izceļojis franču pāris Spānijas laukos vada organisko saimniecību, taču rodas nesaskaņas ar vietējiem ciemata iedzīvotājiem.

programme.title: Rodeo: Pro Bull Riding. Tacoma
programme.desc: "The Toughest Sport on Dirt" comes to major venues around America, where the Top 35 bull riders in the world compete week in and week out on the Built Ford Tough Series.

programme.title: ACB league. Real Madrid - Baskonia
programme.desc: Tune in and follow all the matches from the ACB League, also known as the Endesa League for sponsorship reasons, the top-tier men's basketball league in Spain.

programme.title: Futbols: Serie A. Fiorentina - Atalanta
programme.desc: Coverage of Italy's top-flight football league.

programme.title: Futbols: LaLiga. Valencia - Barcelona
programme.desc: La Liga (The Campeonato Nacional de Liga de Primera División) is the men's top professional football division of the Spanish football league system. It is administered by the National Professional Football League and has 20 contestants, with the three lowest-placed teams at the end of each season relegated to the Segunda División and replaced by the top two teams and a play-off winner in that division. Nine teams have become champions, Real Madrid has got the title 33 times and FC Barcelona 26 times. La Liga is one of the most popular professional sports leagues in the world and the top league in Europe over the last five years.

programme.title: Futbols: Serie A. Milan - Cagliari
programme.desc: Coverage of Italy's top-flight football league.

programme.title: NBA .. Izslēgšanas spēles. Austrumu konf. Fināls. 4. spēle. Cavaliers - Knicks
programme.desc: The National Basketball Association composes of thirty teams across North America for men who are professional in this specific sport. Due to its popularity, this is one of four major professional sport leagues available in the United States of America and Canada. Furthermore, research suggests that it is widely considered to be the premier men's basketball league in the world. Legends of this particular sport include Kobe Bryant, Michael Jordan and Kareem Abdul-Jabbar.

programme.title: NBA .. Izslēgšanas spēles. Rietumu konf. Fināls. 5. spēle. Thunder - Spurs

programme.title: Futbols: Bundesliga. Par vietas saglabāšanu augstākajā līgā. 2. spēle. Paderborn - Wolfsburg
programme.desc: Germany has the most attended football league in the world, in the Bundesliga. We bring these authentic fab experiences to your living room with all the key moments of the 2019-20 season, to ensure that your appetite for German football is well and truly met. The likes of Borussia Dortmund and Bayern Munich are met with stern competition this season, as RB Leipzig look to build on their third-placed finish from last season. This programme brings all the games of the german top-flight into one place, so that you can easily catch up with the week's action. As we reach the business end-of-the-season, watch the victors and losers dictate the final table. With relegation spots and Champions League places yet to be decided, it promises to be a rather exciting conclusion for all those concerned.

programme.title: Anything But Gray
programme.desc: Gray and team transform a historic Charleston duplex into a single-family home with a bold design - just in time for the homeowner's birthday.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Erin and Ben Napier love their small Mississippi hometown, especially the old historical houses. Using found materials and old textiles, they're keeping the character of these classic homes but giving them modern and affordable updates. From Erin's imaginative hand sketches to Ben's custom handiwork, this couple is bringing homes back to life and making sure their small town's future is as bright as its past.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: The Lakehouse
programme.desc: Chip and Jo go big, reviving a lakehouse estate stuck in the 1960s. It requires overhauling the floorplan and blending two distinct design styles.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: The Lakehouse
programme.desc: Chip and Jo come up with ways to bring the outdoors into the overall space to enhance the midcentury modern features and incredible cliffside view.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Most people only fantasize about living on an island, but we'll prove that an Island Life is possible for anyone. Tropical dreamers will be shown island properties that fit into any budget, from ultra-affordable to totally outrageous. We'll follow everyday families is search of their own slice of paradise, and prove that fantasy can be reality.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Attempting to bring families' dreams come to life, but on a budget, Beachfront Bargain Hunt shows that you don't have to be a millionaire if you want to live a life by the sea! Narrated by John Beach, this show follows a number of couples, families and people looking just for themselves exploring various beachfront's in USA, looking for homes that won't break the bank. Ensuring each person gets what they want, they are introduced to a number of properties that meet their ultimate dream home in the hopes that they will indeed find the one. With 101 episodes, Beachfront Bargain Hunt introduces you to the life that can be led, without breaking to bank, to live a life by the sea!

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: American reality series following host Suzanne Whang on her quest to help people relocate in search of their dream home. Follow the individuals, couples and families in an international search for their perfect property, exploring a stunning selection of homes chosen just for them. With three potential candidates to choose from, join them as they try and make the difficult decision to start a new life abroad. Revisit the new homeowners at the end of each episode to see how their properties have developed and how life has changed for them since the move.

programme.title: House Hunters

programme.title: Flip or Flop Atlanta
programme.desc: This reality renovation show, a spin-off of the popular Flip or Flop reality home improvement series, takes you to the American state of Georgia as Ken and Anita Corsini welcome you to Atlanta! Together they buy up neglected homes in need of a bit of love and attention to renovate them so they can be sold at a profit. They take on all sorts of projects, big and small, but they're never entirely sure of the challenges they face with the home until they start to restore it. Ken is an experienced real estate investor who has bought and sold over 500 properties. But that doesn’t mean it’s all plain-sailing. Ken and his wife Anita must use their experience, expertise and creativity as they face the difficulties that come with flipping houses.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A couple is tired of their boring lifestyle in Urbana, Ohio, and wants to liven things up on Indian Lake. They hope to find a large turnkey home with space for extended family, as well as a dock for the boat he's always wanted.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A couple has grown tired of hectic city life and is anxious to return to their hometown of Indian Lake, OH. Both are able to work remotely, so they're heading back to their old stomping grounds to find the perfect dream home.

programme.title: House Hunters Renovation
programme.desc: Finding the perfect home is never easy, but these aspirational house hunters don't plan on making it any easier for themselves. Meet the budding designers, builders and decorators determined to start from scratch and take on the mega projects all for themselves. Each episode features a new group of hopefuls looking to find cheap run-down houses with the aim of rapidly transforming them into their dream family homes. As families and friends embark on their mission to construct their future homes, follow their progress as they encounter all of excitement, stress and chaos that comes with home renovation.

programme.title: Fixer To Fabulous
programme.desc: When Jenny's parents decided to make the move to Bentonville, Arkansas, from Florida, the Marrs were thrilled to have them closer ... but after months of living under the same roof, it's time for Joan and Steve to have a fabulous dream home of their own.

programme.title: Building Roots
programme.desc: Beautiful and innovative home renos inspired by stunning natural surroundings get a spotlight in the new HGTV series, Building Roots. Starring husband and wife duo Ben and Cristi Dozier, the series features the couple as they build, design and renovate properties in their dreamy hometown of Pagosa Springs, Colorado. During the series, Ben and Cristi produce one-of-a-kind, highly personalized work that always exceeds their clients' expectations.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: A family of four has outgrown their loft and is ready to use their all-in budget of $200,000 to move into an family home with a yard. Ben and Erin show the parents two family-friendly houses -- a dated, boxy home with 14 acres of property and a split-level ranch with a problem layout. Ben and Erin then transform the family's pick into the ultimate home with an open concept and outdoor space complete with an arbor.

programme.title: Unspouse My House
programme.desc: Forgetting your ex isn't so easy when your whole house reminds you of them. Everywhere you turn, there's that horrible wall paper they insisted on getting, pictures of your holidays together, they even painted your front door their favourite colour. That's where designer Orlando Soria comes in. Orlando considers himself somewhat a break-up expert, and he's determined to give these newly single clients' houses the new lease of life that they so desperately need, allowing them to move on from their ex.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programme.desc: American home improvement series. Presenter Jasmine Roth visits the homes of DIY catastrophes to restore them back to a liveable space. Jasmine brings in the professionals to rescue these renovations-gone-wrong and helps homeowners realise their property's full potential. With half-demolished houses, unfinished floors and plumbing nightmares: these refurbishment mishaps are on a monumental scale. Luckily, with expertise, hard work and vision, Jasmine and her team can hopefully transform these DIY disasters into something beautiful that their owners will love.

programme.title: Fixer To Fabulous
programme.desc: When this widow purchased this house with her husband years ago, neither of them knew what life had in store. Now, she wants to fulfill her late husband's dream to transform their outdated house into a beautiful, modern farmhouse home. Dave and Jenny help bring that dream to life for the woman and her two teenage sons by incorporating one of their favorite pastimes, a karaoke cabinet in their den. They also create a cool, custom basketball court for the sons and a modern outdoor entertaining space where this single mom can gather with her family and friends for years to come.

programme.title: Celebrity IOU
programme.desc: Follow an array of Hollywood superstars as they embark on an exciting and heart-warming mission, expressing their gratitude to the most important people in their lives by surprising them with huge and incredible home renovations. There to help them on their adventure are twin brothers Drew and Jonathan Scott. Some of the amazing people featured on the programme are Rebel Wilson, Bred Pitt, Jeremy Renner, Michael Buble, Allison Janney, LeAnn Rimes, Kevin Hart, and many others.

programme.title: Mexico Life
programme.desc: Mexico is a country unlike many others; gorgeous climate, a Caribbean coastline, vibrant cities, and unimaginable history. This American reality series follows prospective homebuyers as they venture into this Central American paradise to find their dream property, with the help of expert realtors. Whatever their reasons for moving; sun, sand, surf or simply a change of scenery, the realtors aid the buyers every step of the way, helping them to locate ideal properties that they can either move into or enjoy as a holiday home. Follow the couples and families as they set off on a Mexican adventure that will change their lives forever.

programme.desc: A couple aspires to run a family business renovating homes. They soon find that for their first flip, a huge house is not for the faint of heart.

Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Attempting to bring families' dreams come to life, but on a budget, Beachfront Bargain Hunt shows that you don't have to be a millionaire if you want to live a life by the sea! Narrated by John Beach, this show follows a number of couples, families and people looking just for themselves exploring various beachfront's in USA, looking for homes that won't break the bank. Ensuring each person gets what they want, they are introduced to a number of properties that meet their ultimate dream home in the hopes that they will indeed find the one. With 101 episodes, Beachfront Bargain Hunt introduces you to the life that can be led, without breaking to bank, to live a life by the sea!

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: American reality series following host Suzanne Whang on her quest to help people relocate in search of their dream home. Follow the individuals, couples and families in an international search for their perfect property, exploring a stunning selection of homes chosen just for them. With three potential candidates to choose from, join them as they try and make the difficult decision to start a new life abroad. Revisit the new homeowners at the end of each episode to see how their properties have developed and how life has changed for them since the move.

programme.title: House Hunters

programme.title: Flip or Flop Atlanta
programme.desc: This reality renovation show, a spin-off of the popular Flip or Flop reality home improvement series, takes you to the American state of Georgia as Ken and Anita Corsini welcome you to Atlanta! Together they buy up neglected homes in need of a bit of love and attention to renovate them so they can be sold at a profit. They take on all sorts of projects, big and small, but they're never entirely sure of the challenges they face with the home until they start to restore it. Ken is an experienced real estate investor who has bought and sold over 500 properties. But that doesn’t mean it’s all plain-sailing. Ken and his wife Anita must use their experience, expertise and creativity as they face the difficulties that come with flipping houses.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Most people only fantasize about living on an island, but we'll prove that an Island Life is possible for anyone. Tropical dreamers will be shown island properties that fit into any budget, from ultra-affordable to totally outrageous. We'll follow everyday families is search of their own slice of paradise, and prove that fantasy can be reality.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: As their daughters get older, Georgia residents Lisa and Kevin are looking for a change of pace from their busy lives. They're looking for a home in Hilton Head, SC, that their kids will always want to return to.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Erin and Ben Napier love their small Mississippi hometown, especially the old historical houses. Using found materials and old textiles, they're keeping the character of these classic homes but giving them modern and affordable updates. From Erin's imaginative hand sketches to Ben's custom handiwork, this couple is bringing homes back to life and making sure their small town's future is as bright as its past.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: The Lakehouse
programme.desc: Chip and Jo focus on custom millwork styled to match the home's mid-century modern origins and add a water feature to the courtyard.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: The Lakehouse
programme.desc: Chip and Jo merge mid-century modern and Spanish revival design styles with unique tiles and custom metal details in the bathroom and recreation room.

programme.title: Fixer To Fabulous
programme.desc: Tired of their tight quarters in New Jersey, two best friends were happy to be transferred back to Bentonville, Arkansas, for work. Luckily, Dave and Jenny Marrs have a rental property that is ready to be custom-renovated with cool Caribbean style.

programme.title: Down Home Fab
programme.desc: Chelsea and Cole help a single dad of three who wants to honor his late wife by carrying out her vision for their home. They look to take on the meaningful renovation with a new kitchen and living room and give the kids the bedrooms they deserve.

programme.title: Down Home Fab
programme.desc: Chelsea and Cole take on newlyweds with a specific design sensibility they want to see reflected in their world travels. The DeBoers look to create a custom design that matches the couple's experiences and also provides space to grow their family.

programme.title: Celebrity IOU
programme.desc: Follow an array of Hollywood superstars as they embark on an exciting and heart-warming mission, expressing their gratitude to the most important people in their lives by surprising them with huge and incredible home renovations. There to help them on their adventure are twin brothers Drew and Jonathan Scott. Some of the amazing people featured on the programme are Rebel Wilson, Bred Pitt, Jeremy Renner, Michael Buble, Allison Janney, LeAnn Rimes, Kevin Hart, and many others.

programme.title: Why the Heck Did I Buy This House?
programme.desc: Designer and renovator Kim Wolfe comes to the rescue of homeowners feeling major buyer's remorse. This former Survivor winner and mom of three uses her expert skills to reinvent lifeless spaces and make homeowners finally fall in love with their home.

programme.title: Why the Heck Did I Buy This House?

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programme.desc: American home improvement series. Presenter Jasmine Roth visits the homes of DIY catastrophes to restore them back to a liveable space. Jasmine brings in the professionals to rescue these renovations-gone-wrong and helps homeowners realise their property's full potential. With half-demolished houses, unfinished floors and plumbing nightmares: these refurbishment mishaps are on a monumental scale. Luckily, with expertise, hard work and vision, Jasmine and her team can hopefully transform these DIY disasters into something beautiful that their owners will love.

programme.title: Fixer To Fabulous
programme.desc: After some health scares left this young couple wondering if they would ever be able to grow their family, they are ecstatic to find out that mama is pregnant with another child. This means their young son is going to be a big brother. Dave and Jenny jump at the chance to transform this Tudor-style-leaning house into a full blown Cotswold cottage, but more open and hip for this young family. In the end, Dave and Jenny get to reveal this family's dream home... AND if they are having a baby boy or a baby girl.

programme.title: Mexico Life
programme.desc: Mexico is a country unlike many others; gorgeous climate, a Caribbean coastline, vibrant cities, and unimaginable history. This American reality series follows prospective homebuyers as they venture into this Central American paradise to find their dream property, with the help of expert realtors. Whatever their reasons for moving; sun, sand, surf or simply a change of scenery, the realtors aid the buyers every step of the way, helping them to locate ideal properties that they can either move into or enjoy as a holiday home. Follow the couples and families as they set off on a Mexican adventure that will change their lives forever.

programme.title: Izzy Does It
programme.desc: Izzy faces a tough renovation as a beach loving family needs help updating their home after buying it sight unseen; with unexpected costs, delays and rising tensions, Izzy gets pushed to a breaking point as the pressure builds.

programme.title: First Time Fixer
programme.desc: A couple tackles a huge remodel of their outdated Texas home for their family of five, expanding the kitchen and adding a spa-style bathroom.

programme.title: First Time Fixer
programme.desc: A couple revamps their California bungalow with just 10 weeks and a tiny budget.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab
programme.desc: Windy City Rehab is a reality renovation show hosted by interior designer Alison Victoria. She and her expert team buy and restore old homes in her beloved Chicago historic neighborhoods. It is much more than a simple improvement of a house. Alison and her team are rescuing vintage houses and hold true to the original style and architecture as much as possible. They do their best to pay tribute to the historic roots, while integrating some modern makeovers.

programme.title: Inside Out
programme.desc: The seven-episode series follows Carmine, a real estate agent and interior designer, and Mike, a landscape designer, as they each pitch their design plans to clients. The budget is set, so the guys must be persuasive to score a bigger chunk of the dollars to either max out the interiors or make the most of the outdoor spruce up.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: After visiting Emerald Isle, NC, on vacation with their kids, a couple is ready to leave Wake Forest, NC, and move to the beach full-time. They are determined to find a place of their own where every day feels like a holiday.

Ken and his wife Anita must use their experience, expertise and creativity as they face the difficulties that come with flipping houses.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Long before banks, ATMs and check-cashing services, there were pawn shops. Pawning was the leading form of consumer credit in the United States until the 1950s, and pawn shops are still helping everyday people make ends meet. "Pawn Stars" takes you inside the colorful world of the pawn business. At the Gold & Silver Pawn Shop on the outskirts of Las Vegas, three generations of the Harrison family — grandfather Richard, son Rick and grandson Corey — jointly run the family business, and there's clashing and camaraderie every step of the way. The three men use their sharp eyes and skills to assess the value of items from the commonplace to the truly historic, including a 16th-century samurai sword, a Super Bowl ring, a Picasso painting and a 17th-century stay of execution. It's up to them to determine what's real and what's fake, as they reveal the often surprising answer to the questions on everyone's mind, "What's the story behind it?" and "What's it worth?"

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: For over two centuries, teams of searchers, including Franklin D. Roosevelt, have attempted to crack the code that will unearth the treasure believed to be buried on the small island off the coast of Nova Scotia. Armed with the knowledge of those that came before them, the muscle of heavy machinery and decades of engineering know-how, brothers Rick and Marty Lagina and their partners may be closer than anyone in history to finding the treasure that has so far claimed the lives of six men.

programme.title: The UnXplained with William Shatner
programme.desc: World War II was the largest, and deadliest, conflict in human history. From 1939 until 1945, more than fifty nations engaged in harrowing combat-and during that time, a number of intriguing and persistent mysteries were born. Nearly eighty years later, curious stories about everything from lost gold to secret societies and highly-advanced technology remain unexplained. Can new information help us better understand the strangest tales of the Second World War?

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: In September 1939, enabled by a secret pact between Adolf Hitler and Josef Stalin, Germany invades Poland with its lightning style of tank warfare, plunging Europe back into war.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: After toppling the Netherlands and Belgium, Nazi Germany pushes further west. The Allies scramble to support France as Churchill is forced to defend Britain from the skies and FDR rushes to mobilise wartime production.

The three men use their sharp eyes and skills to assess the value of items from the commonplace to the truly historic, including a 16th-century samurai sword, a Super Bowl ring, a Picasso painting and a 17th-century stay of execution. It's up to them to determine what's real and what's fake, as they reveal the often surprising answer to the questions on everyone's mind, "What's the story behind it?" and "What's it worth?"

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: Tony Harris separates the real from the fake in some of the most compelling Bigfoot evidence recently captured. Are footprint casts from Mt. St. Helens proof that a massive, undiscovered primate lives in North America? Have a father and son team captured the most convincing footage of Bigfoot since the famous Patterson-Gimlin film, using a thermal imaging camera? Harris and a collection of top researchers, investigators, academics, and scientists, evaluate the latest and most intriguing sounds, photos and videos, to analyze and pass verdicts on their authenticity.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: For over two centuries, teams of searchers, including Franklin D. Roosevelt, have attempted to crack the code that will unearth the treasure believed to be buried on the small island off the coast of Nova Scotia. Armed with the knowledge of those that came before them, the muscle of heavy machinery and decades of engineering know-how, brothers Rick and Marty Lagina and their partners may be closer than anyone in history to finding the treasure that has so far claimed the lives of six men.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Explores the controversial theory that extraterrestrials have visited Earth for millions of years. Did intelligent beings from outer space visit Earth thousands of years ago?

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: The world's most mysterious videos, photos, and audio recordings, and uses the best technology and experts to render a credible verdict. Each episode analyzes and passes verdicts on several seemingly impossible things "caught on film" including giant beasts, UFOS, apocalyptic sounds, hairy humans, alleged mutants from the deep, conspiracies, and many other cases. Host and veteran journalist Tony Harris takes nothing for granted in a quest for answers, tracking down eyewitnesses, putting each photo or film through a battery of tests, calling out the hoaxes, and highlighting the most credible evidence in an attempt to better understand our world.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: Did a Chilean family photograph a real UFO flying above the Andes Mountains? Is footage of a tall, dark-colored, hairy creature walking through the woods proof the legendary Ohio Grassman exists? Does a huge, 5,000-year-old horn discovered on a beach in England belong to a prehistoric creature that still lives? Scientists and citizens attempt to decipher the mysterious inscription of a sword found in River Witham, Lincolnshire. Tony Harris and his team of experts examine the clues.

programme.title: Mankind Decoded
programme.desc: Using dramatic reconstructions, this fascinating documentary series explores the evolution and advancement of the human race, dissecting the key events and changes that have affected and altered various civilisations. Each episode in this 12-part series focusses on a unique transformation of our ancestors, as they discovered more and more about the planet they inhabit. With expert historians offering explanations to these changes, the series reveals how powerful forces of nature compelled humans to adapt, the birth of war, the discovery of fire and metals, and the building of giant structures, among many others.

programme.title: Hunting Hitler
programme.desc: An FBI cold case that has laid dormant for 70 years leads a group of world-renown investigators on the ultimate manhunt to finally answer the question: Did Adolf Hitler survive World War II? In early 2014 the FBI declassified hundreds of confidential documents showing that Hitler may have not committed suicide but rather escaped to South America after the fall of Germany. A memo from J. Edgar Hoover himself states "American Army officials in Germany have not located Hitler's body nor is there any reliable source that will say definitely that Hitler is dead." Armed with the most cutting edge technology and these newly released FBI files the team will approach this case like a modern death claims investigation. programme.title: Cities of the Underworld
programme.desc: In major cities around the world today, skyscrapers loom overhead, taxis honk their horns and street vendors peddle their wares. This series will explore these layers, which are often hundreds of feet deep, and examine a city's ancient cisterns, dank dungeons, eerie tombs, clandestine hideouts, and even underground shipwrecks that have been lost for hundreds and hundreds of years. programme.title: Lost Worlds
programme.desc: The Cold War was one of paranoia and potential nuclear catastrophe. In the wreckages of missile sites, secret cities and crumbling nuclear facilities, join a team of historical detectives as they search for clues to understand how this "war" was played out and the secret structures that were constructed to arm the nation against attack. From fifteen-meter concrete walls to airtight steel doors and massive nuclear production plants, this episode reveals the awesome engineering that took place across America.

programme.title: The Universe
programme.desc: Every day, new information is discovered that helps us better understand how our Universe works. Some of this evidence solves mysteries dating back thousands of years. Some evidence offers new theories on how human civilization came into existence. In this season of The Universe: Ancient Mysteries Solved, we'll tackle mysteries such as an American Stonehenge built 500 years before Columbus, and how the Aztec Pyramids helped seal the downfall of the Mayan and Aztec empires. We'll also look at some of the Roman Empires' most iconic structures, and their connection to archeo-astronomy.

programme.title: Mankind Decoded
programme.desc: Using dramatic reconstructions, this fascinating documentary series explores the evolution and advancement of the human race, dissecting the key events and changes that have affected and altered various civilisations. Each episode in this 12-part series focusses on a unique transformation of our ancestors, as they discovered more and more about the planet they inhabit. With expert historians offering explanations to these changes, the series reveals how powerful forces of nature compelled humans to adapt, the birth of war, the discovery of fire and metals, and the building of giant structures, among many others.

programme.title: Mankind Decoded

With expert historians offering explanations to these changes, the series reveals how powerful forces of nature compelled humans to adapt, the birth of war, the discovery of fire and metals, and the building of giant structures, among many others.

programme.title: Gold Hunters: Legend of the Superstition Mountains
programme.desc: Legend tells of the Lost Dutchman's gold mine hidden somewhere within the 160,000 acres of brutal Arizona desert known as the "Superstition Mountains." The promise of a $200 million mother lode has lured thousands of treasure hunters and continues to claim the lives of those eager to decipher the legend's clues and riddles. Hunting for the Lost Dutchman is typically a one-man journey, but lifelong Dutch Hunter Wayne Tuttle is breaking with tradition and partnering with a team of experts to follow a newly revealed clue that could finally solve the 500-year-old mystery of America's most famous and deadliest buried treasure. With cursed mountains said to drive men mad and a hidden fortune of gold worth killing for, the treasure hunter's greatest danger may be the man at his side. Trust at your own peril if you dare to tread into HISTORY's Legend of the Superstition Mountains.

programme.title: Cities of the Underworld
programme.desc: In major cities around the world today, skyscrapers loom overhead, taxis honk their horns and street vendors peddle their wares. But below lies city upon city - each with its fascinating and unknown history. This series will explore these layers, which are often hundreds of feet deep, and examine a city's ancient cisterns, dank dungeons, eerie tombs, clandestine hideouts, and even underground shipwrecks that have been lost for hundreds and hundreds of years. What are the underground layers of the most populated cities on earth? And how did (and do) engineers build layer upon layer up to today's city streets? This series will reveal the technological marvels that allowed the construction of one city upon another - literally.

programme.title: Lost Worlds
programme.desc: Documentary series that brings back to life lost cities, structures, cultures, and civilisations, transporting viewers back in time and revealing the truth behind some of history's most iconic eras. Using a combination of cutting-edge technology and archaeological research, the team detail what life was like for these places during their peak of their powers, and use visual overlays to compare past and present landscapes. From the Knights Templar to the lost city of Atlantis, ancient Egypt to Hitler's planned supercity, and ancient Athens to America's wild west, each episodes dives into these extraordinary remnants of human history.

programme.title: The Tesla Files
programme.desc: Why were trunks belonging to genius inventor Nikola Tesla confiscated in 1943? Did they contain the plans for nearly free worldwide electricity, massive death rays, and other inventions out of the future? A new investigation driven by declassified CIA documents suggests a secret history of bitter rivalries, government conspiracies, Cold War and WW2 spycraft, extra-terrestrial communication, and amazing achievements of a truly gifted man – Nikola Tesla.

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers
programme.desc: After the fall of France in 1940, Dönitz's trio of aces embark on a race to sink British merchant ships. In Britain, the woman who will frustrate his plans turns the Women's Royal Naval Service into a force to be reckoned with.

programme.title: Warriors
programme.desc: Former Green Berry Terry Schappert explores the stories of some of the most iconic warrior groups in history, including their weaponry, training, fighting tactics and more. The veteran investigates what made these legendary fighters great, but also what were their weaknesses. Join him as he looks into the battling masteries of the Vikings, the Samurai, the Spartans and more.

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers
programme.desc: After the fall of France in 1940, Dönitz's trio of aces embark on a race to sink British merchant ships. In Britain, the woman who will frustrate his plans turns the Women's Royal Naval Service into a force to be reckoned with.

programme.title: Warriors
programme.desc: Former Green Berry Terry Schappert explores the stories of some of the most iconic warrior groups in history, including their weaponry, training, fighting tactics and more. The veteran investigates what made these legendary fighters great, but also what were their weaknesses. Join him as he looks into the battling masteries of the Vikings, the Samurai, the Spartans and more.

programme.title: Gold Hunters: Legend of the Superstition Mountains
programme.desc: Legend tells of the Lost Dutchman's gold mine hidden somewhere within the 160,000 acres of brutal Arizona desert known as the "Superstition Mountains." The promise of a $200 million mother lode has lured thousands of treasure hunters and continues to claim the lives of those eager to decipher the legend's clues and riddles. Hunting for the Lost Dutchman is typically a one-man journey, but lifelong Dutch Hunter Wayne Tuttle is breaking with tradition and partnering with a team of experts to follow a newly revealed clue that could finally solve the 500-year-old mystery of America's most famous and deadliest buried treasure. With cursed mountains said to drive men mad and a hidden fortune of gold worth killing for, the treasure hunter's greatest danger may be the man at his side. Trust at your own peril if you dare to tread into HISTORY's Legend of the Superstition Mountains.

programme.title: Cities of the Underworld
programme.desc: In major cities around the world today, skyscrapers loom overhead, taxis honk their horns and street vendors peddle their wares. But below lies city upon city - each with its fascinating and unknown history. This series will explore these layers, which are often hundreds of feet deep, and examine a city's ancient cisterns, dank dungeons, eerie tombs, clandestine hideouts, and even underground shipwrecks that have been lost for hundreds and hundreds of years. What are the underground layers of the most populated cities on earth? And how did (and do) engineers build layer upon layer up to today's city streets? This series will reveal the technological marvels that allowed the construction of one city upon another - literally.

programme.title: Lost Worlds
programme.desc: Documentary series that brings back to life lost cities, structures, cultures, and civilisations, transporting viewers back in time and revealing the truth behind some of history's most iconic eras. Using a combination of cutting-edge technology and archaeological research, the team detail what life was like for these places during their peak of their powers, and use visual overlays to compare past and present landscapes. From the Knights Templar to the lost city of Atlantis, ancient Egypt to Hitler's planned supercity, and ancient Athens to America's wild west, each episodes dives into these extraordinary remnants of human history.

programme.title: The Universe
programme.desc: Every day, new information is discovered that helps us better understand how our Universe works. Some of this evidence solves mysteries dating back thousands of years. Some evidence offers new theories on how human civilization came into existence. In this season of The Universe: Ancient Mysteries Solved, we'll tackle mysteries such as an American Stonehenge built 500 years before Columbus, and how the Aztec Pyramids helped seal the downfall of the Mayan and Aztec empires. We'll also look at some of the Roman Empires' most iconic structures, and their connection to archeo-astronomy.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Explores the controversial theory that extraterrestrials have visited Earth for millions of years. From the age of the dinosaurs to ancient Egypt, from early cave drawings to continued mass sightings in the US, each episode gives historic depth to the questions, speculations, provocative controversies, first-hand accounts and grounded theories surrounding this age old debate. Did intelligent beings from outer space visit Earth thousands of years ago?

programme.title: Rome: Rise & Fall of an Empire
programme.desc: When Roman generals Pompey and Crassus lead their mighty legions of soldiers and mercenaries into the lands surrounding Italy, neither could anticipate the turmoil caused by one bold mercenary: Spartacus. A Thracian warrior, Spartacus deserts the Roman army, but is captured and made a slave, forced to fight as a gladiator. But in 73 BC the untamable barbarian leads a slave revolt of 70,000 gladiators against the Roman Republic. Though the brutal and conniving Roman General Crassus is finally able to suppress the revolt, his rival, the more popular Pompey, takes all the credit, sparking a division within the Republic itself that will ultimately spell its demise.

programme.title: Missing in Alaska
programme.desc: The Alaska Triangle, a region in northwest Alaska, has more unsolved missing person cases than anywhere else in the world. Over 20,000 people have vanished in the past 50 years alone. Who or what's behind these cases is unknown. Some believe it's the work of local predators or simply the rugged, dangerous terrain, but legends thrive in Alaska, and the ominous history of disappearances in the area has drawn comparisons to the Bermuda Triangle. Working together with local experts and eyewitnesses, our team of investigators will go case-by-case to gather evidence, conduct tests, examine history and explore local myths to determine the most viable explanation for the disappearances, all while trying to understand the sinister mystery that is the Alaska Triangle.

programme.title: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar
programme.desc: Lost Relic Hunters follows the work of one of the world's most prolific collectors of antiquities, Hamilton White, and his long-time friend and business partner, Carl Cookson. The intrepid duo are back on the trail of some truly astonishing relics and historical pieces, which, if authenticated, will potentially change our understanding of some of the most iconic periods of British and European history. Aided in their adventures by cultural and art historian Dr Janina Ramirez, Lost Relic Hunters sees Carl and Hamilton journey to breath-taking locations around the world including Venice, Istanbul, Barcelona, Jerusalem and the Pyrenees, in their quest to authenticate the rare and precious antiquities from Hamilton's collection.
