programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: Exodus and the conquest of the land of Canaan are among the Bible's most famous stories. They tell how the Israelites triumphed, with the help of the Ark of the Covenant. The problem is that there is little archaeological evidence that these tales happened exactly as the Bible describes. Across the Holy Land, archaeologists and investigators dig through the ruins of ancient cities to uncover the real world behind the biblical accounts. Just west of Jerusalem, one team explores a cave tomb to reveal evidence for the origins of the Israelites' enemies, the Philistines. In northern Israel, another team excavates the remains of the Canaanite kingdom's mightiest stronghold and finds mysterious Egyptian artifacts that shed new light on the traditional tale of the Israelites' journey to what the Bible calls the Promised Land.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: The legend of David and Goliath is one of the Bible's most famous stories. It tells of a battle between a young shepherd boy and a nine-foot-tall warrior. Now, teams of archaeologists investigate the real world behind this epic showdown. At Tel Azekah, excavators uncover the remains of an ancient city, destroyed by a devastating fire. In Egypt, inscriptions from the Temple of Karnak hint at the surprising origins of the Philistines, some of the Bible's most fearsome warriors, and at the ruined city of Gath, excavators uncover a fragment of pottery with two ancient names. Did a real Goliath live in this city?

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: CBP Officers on the Southern Border discover two loads of lethal fentanyl concealed within cars - 7.66 kilos that are magnetized to the underside of a vehicle, and 4.06 kilos that are hidden within a car's air filter. Amidst a tightening of Covid-19 immigration restrictions, CBP at Newark Seaport searches for an illegal stowaway onboard a container ship. And CBP at Newark Airport discovers ecstasy and ketamine concealed within express shipments.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nation's airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: Yukon Rescue
programme.desc: Frigid temperatures wreak havoc on Dawson City. A midnight call to a truck fire in -30°C weather finds the crew fighting to extinguish the flames and rescue the driver. Later, the cold snap bursts pipes across town, and Chief Mike's team must put their fears aside as they respond to a toxic gas leak. Meanwhile, Yukon communities near the Klondike Highway are cut off from supplies after an avalanche shuts down the main throughway. Avalanche technician Colin takes to the air to break up the snowpack, but when his bombs bounce off the dense, frozen snow, he's forced to come up with a new plan to open up the road.

programme.title: Yukon Rescue
programme.desc: In the dead of night, the Dawson City Fire Department receives multiple 911 calls, sending the small crew of volunteers into action to save a historic building and a family home. Pushed to the brink and stretched thin, Chief Mike embarks on a mission to be better prepared to protect Dawson's community and history from the worst-case scenario. In Whitehorse, a series of snowstorms torments the city. As the sun sets, a snowmobiler stuck in deep snow makes a desperate call for help. Helicopter pilot Adam Fox faces the challenge of getting the citizen and the snowmobile to safety. Meanwhile, out on the highway, icy conditions send a vehicle careening off the road, and Ray's life is in jeopardy as he attempts to retrieve it alone.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: February 12th, 2009 - Two hours behind schedule and nearing the end of its 53-minute trip from Newark, New Jersey, Continental Connections Flight #3407 is approaching Buffalo-Niagara International Airport. Flying through snow and strong winds, the pilots can see the lights of the city below, but as they extend the flaps to slow the plane, the control column suddenly starts to shake. It's a warning that the plane is about to stall. The captain struggles to keep the plane flying but the out-of-control aircraft suddenly plummets towards the ground and crashes into a suburban home. It is the worst US crash in more than 7 years, but with a raging fire consuming the wreckage, can investigators determine what went wrong?

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Just minutes from touching down, China Airlines Flight 140 falls out of the sky at Japan's Nagoya Airport. By morning, investigators are already sifting through the charred debris on the runway, but what they find only deepens the mystery. At first it looks as though the pilots are entirely to blame for the disaster, but by the end of the exhaustive two-year investigation, it's clear the causes are far more complex.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: Science of Stupid, series 8. Dallas Campbell hosts the show that combines serious science with some of the craziest, most spectacular user generated clips ever recorded. In each programme we show 40 to 50 clips of misadventure: ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes and paying the price. We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: Science of Stupid, series 8. Dallas Campbell hosts the show that combines serious science with some of the craziest, most spectacular user generated clips ever recorded. In each programme we show 40 to 50 clips of misadventure: ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes and paying the price. We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

programme.title: Challenger Disaster: Lost Tapes
programme.desc: The Challenger Disaster Tapes follows the story of the Space Shuttle Challenger and it's crew, specifically Christa Mcauliffe, the first civilian to be launched into space. Mcauliffe was a teacher from Concord, N.H., She was chosen from thousands of applicants to expand the understanding of the nation's school children about space and the next generation of interplanetary travel. But her dreams - and those of NASA - were tragically cut shot when the Challenger exploded just after liftoff in front of a live television audience. The events of the days leading up to the disaster are detailed in this unique film, which uses no narration and no interviews. Instead the story is told solely with reports of journalists covering the story, extensive recordings from the NASA team and interviews with Mcauliffe and others who were part of this one-off-a-kind mission. Using rarely seen images and audio recordings, The Challenger Disaster Tapes takes viewers behind the scenes of this compelling and historic story in a way never before seen.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry
programme.desc: Hannah Fry visits South Korea to uncover how a nation once defined by war and division became a global force in culture, business, and technology. She explores the billion-dollar world of esports, learns Taekwondo from a blackbelt, meets a kimchi grandmaster, and Jeju's legendary female divers. Along the way, she discovers how South Korea blends tradition with innovation; from family-run business empires to cutting-edge, everyday tech. With curiosity and humour, Hannah reveals how the country's unique mix of ancient values and future-focused thinking turned it into a cultural superpower that continues to shape our lives.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry
programme.desc: Hannah Fry decodes Spain's cultural contradictions. Starting in Madrid, she tries her hand at flamenco and learns how the artform combines both technical discipline and the freedom of improvisation. In Valencia she reveals the origins of paella - a fiercely regional dish that owes its existence to an irrigation system built by invaders from Africa over 700 years ago. In the Canary Islands, where Christoper Colombus first set sail for the Americas, she discovers an ancient whistling language which endured as Spanish conquered the world. Back on the mainland she indulges her love of urban planning in Barcelona, revealing how much of the city's easy charm is built on strict geometric discipline. And in a heart stopping finale, she witnesses the strong community bonds at the heart of gravity-defying human pyramids.

programme.title: Plane Crash Recreated
programme.desc: A routine flight from London Heathrow to Belfast International Airport ended in tragedy when British Midland Flight 92 crashed onto a motorway embankment near the town of Kegworth on 8th January 1989. An engine failure meant the crew would have to make what should have been a straightforward emergency landing. Tragically, the pilots mistakenly identified and shut-off the wrong engine, leading to a catastrophic crash near the M1. In this episode, survivors give us their first-hand account of the horrific accident..

programme.title: Plane Crash Recreated
programme.desc: Plane Crash Recreated Plane Crash Recreated 10 x 60' As passengers, every time we board an aeroplane, we place our trust in the pilot, airline and the aircraft manufacturer and while flying remains the safest form of travel, accidents still happen. 'Plane Crash Recreated' will explain and investigate the world's most infamous plane crashes. Using survivor stories, expert interviews and black-box data, we will experience the final harrowing moments on board these notorious flights. But could the outcome have been different? Using a team of highly skilled test pilots and our own cutting edge flight simulator, we show you the extreme pressure inside the cockpit. When faced with failure, our military, commercial, aerobatic and test-pilots will need to make split-second life-or-death decisions. How will their vastly different training affect their outcome? And with the benefit of hindsight, what would they do differently?

programme.title: Plane Crash Recreated
programme.desc: Turkish Airlines Flight 1951 was less than a mile from the runway at Amsterdam Schiphol Airport when it catastrophically crashed on 25 February 2009. The aircraft broke into three pieces on impact, killing nine passengers and crew and all three pilots. A faulty radio altimeter was the initial catalyst in a chain of errors that led to the horrific crash. In this episode, survivors tell their story of escaping from the wreckage of what should have been a normal commute home to Amsterdam..

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nation's airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: CBP officers at PortMiami find nine kilograms of cocaine worth $460,000 magnetically attached to a ship, before unboxing a load of styrofoam found to conceal 215 kilograms of cocaine worth $11 million. In El Paso, HSI agents pursue an SUV loaded with eight kilograms of cocaine in the hopes of busting a cartel handoff. At JFK, officers screen flights for individuals attempting to bring luxury goods into the US without paying import duty taxes.

programme.title: Construction Fails
programme.desc: When a faraway earthquake brings a Bangkok skyscraper crashing down, investigators wonder why it was the only one to fail. Was a deadly wind whipped up by the tallest tower in Yorkshire? The destruction of a Danish landmark highlights the risks of historic renovation, a Bronx building collapse shows that any renovation is risky if not done according to plan, and working with mobile cranes reveals a long history of contemporary errors.

programme.title: Construction Fails
programme.desc: Florida experienced one of the deadliest structural failures in American history; India's dams are in distress after an avalanche of disasters; a partial collapse shuts down a Mallorca nightclub; and it's a race against time to save Italy's other leaning tower. We find out what happens when air gets into an airplane and how much huffing and puffing it actually takes to bring a brick house down.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: It's a foggy day at Ireland's Cork Airport and the pilots of Manx2 Flight 7100 are circling the airport waiting for the weather to clear. After controllers clear the turboprop commuter plane for landing, the pilots reduce their speed and descend, but the aircraft suddenly goes into a severe roll and crashes into the runway. It's the deadliest crash in Ireland in decades, and it's up to the Irish Air Accident Investigation Unit to figure out what went wrong. They soon discover the fog is only part of the story, and the investigation reveals a startling gap in aviation safety that has put passengers' lives at risk.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Taking off during a major storm, a brand-new 737 falls from the sky over West Africa, and an international group of investigators soon descends on Cameroon. Submerged in mud and water, Kenya Airlines Flight 507 crashed into a mangrove swamp, killing everyone on board. And while investigators ultimately pinpoint one fatal mistake that triggered the tragedy, they also uncover a lethal cascade of issues that sent the passenger jet spiralling toward the ground.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: In Iraq, archaeologists investigate the truth behind the legendary city of Babylon. First discovered in the 1800s, this vast ancient metropolis was home to extraordinary structures and a long line of notorious rulers. Babylon is one of the most famous cities in the Bible, mentioned hundreds of times, from the first book of Genesis to Revelation. But why did it have such a hold over the writers of the Bible? International teams of experts investigate ancient cities across Mesopotamia, which could shed light on this mystery. From the cultural wonders and dramatic history of Nineveh to the extraordinary ziggurat at Dur-Kurigalzu, exploring these sites helps reveal the real world of Babylon and illuminate why it was such a source of inspiration and fascination for the Bible's authors.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: The book of Revelation tells of an apocalyptic battle of good versus evil at the end of the world. It says the battle will happen in a place called Armageddon, but Armageddon is no myth. It takes its name from a real ancient settlement: Megiddo. So, what happened here to inspire a Biblical tale of such drama? Archaeologists believe that a series of battles took place here over several centuries, which may have given Megiddo a reputation for violence, turmoil and war as a series of powerful civilizations claimed it as their own. The Egyptians, Assyrians and — according to the Bible — the Israelites all flattened and then rebuilt the city. Finally, it was the site of a battle between King Josiah, the last of the line of King David, and the Egyptians, resulting in Josiah's death. Could these events be the origins of the Armageddon story?

programme.title: Inside Airport: Lost & Found
programme.desc: An intrepid team of investigators in Denver and Salt Lake City reunites travelers with such lost items as a priceless Native American regalia, a taxidermied rat, a high school wrestling state championship ring, and a fanny pack with a wallet, passport and government IDs. Plus, we head down south to visit Unclaimed Baggage, a store brimming with a plethora of lost airport items shoppers can buy.

programme.title: Inside Airport: Lost & Found
programme.desc: Determined airport workers across the country strive to reunite passengers with a curious assortment of lost items, including a prosthetic eye, an espresso machine, a $5000 Gucci bag and a family's beloved heirloom gold Rolex watch. At Philadelphia's International Airport, experts from the zoo arrive with an assortment of animals to help travelers combat the phenomenon known as "airport brain.""

programme.title: Construction Fails
programme.desc: An oversized billboard falls down in Mumbai, causing death and destruction. In Minnesota, too much snow leads to roofs collapsing. A volcano erupts, creating widespread infrastructure damage. A bridge in Pittsburgh plummets to the valley below, taking with it cars and a bus. While digging new subway tunnels in São Paulo, the ground caves in, not once, but twice. Home renovations spark outrage, and eerie abandoned skyscrapers, or "ghost-scrapers," remain unfinished.

programme.title: Construction Fails
programme.desc: One of the world's deadliest natural disasters wreaks havoc across the Spanish province of Valencia in a flash. Cable car rides go from scenic to scary in a snap, an airport parking garage in the UK goes up in flames, and the canopy of a Serbian train station comes down with a bang. A large Romanian bridge has even bigger construction problems, and a few British bike paths have questionable design decisions.

programme.title: Construction Fails
programme.desc: In Thailand, elevated highways keep falling down. A fire breaks out at a bakery in a Uruguayan shopping mall, and a bridge in Colombia collapses just before construction is finished. London's skyline has become a buffet of unsightly skyscrapers, and trucks everywhere are overloaded. Without proper shoring, a building in Iowa crumbles and houses in Rodanthe keep plunging into the ocean.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible

programme.title: Yukon Rescue
programme.desc: An ice jam has severed the remote community of West Dawson from emergency services, leaving residents trapped. A 911 call comes in from across the river, and Chief Mike and his team of volunteers face a nightmare scenario. With no safe routes in or out, volunteer firefighter Chris must brave the treacherous makeshift trails across unstable ice. A terrifying accident on the way home forces an unconventional team of volunteer first responders to come to the rescue. Meanwhile, in Whitehorse, a fierce blizzard batters the highways, burying vehicles and leaving travellers stranded. As conditions spiral into chaos, Ray makes an urgent call for reinforcements, knowing that time is running out for those caught in the storm's icy grip.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: Science of Stupid, series 8. Dallas Campbell hosts the show that combines serious science with some of the craziest, most spectacular user generated clips ever recorded. In each programme we show 40 to 50 clips of misadventure: ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes and paying the price. We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

programme.title: Mission Saturn
programme.desc: This September, the first mission to put a spacecraft in Saturn's orbit to explore and reveal the most iconic planet in our solar system will come to an historic end. In a final display of precision piloting, Cassini will make dangerous dives between Saturn and the inner edge of its rings, dipping into its hazy, often violent atmosphere for the first time to learn even more about a planet it has marveled at for two decades. In a one-hour special event, we will reveal the secrets that Cassini has learned about Saturn, its rings and moons, exposing a planet as it has never been seen.

programme.title: Megafactories
programme.desc: Ultimate Factories also known as Megafactories is an American documentary television series that premiered in 2006 on the National Geographic Channel. The program explores the inner workings of factories worldwide. Each episode profiles the machinery and manpower behind each factory's main product, featuring close-ups, breakdowns, interviews, and side stories to show the sequence of events to produce the product in the factory. Hoff Productions was one of the principal producers of this highly successful series. It also airs in non-US markets as Megafactories.

programme.title: Megafactories
programme.desc: PARAGRAPH It is the worlds most famous sports car Ferrari. ULTIMATE FACTORIES takes you inside Ferraris top-secret factory in Maranello, Italy. Witness the creation of the newest and most powerful Ferrari ever from molten metal to two-hundred miles an hour sports car. Incredible robots and spectacular processes at every point along the production line are filmed with special close-up lenses and illustrated with advanced 3D computer graphics. Learn the design secrets of Ferraris newest car, and take the final test drive on Ferraris private race track, where failure could be catastrophic. TV GUIDE Witness the birth of a Ferrari from molten metal inside one of the most advanced automobile factories on the planet. ULTIMATE FACTORIES shows the creation of one of the worlds most famous sports car the incredible robots and spectacular processes brought to life by unique close-up lenses and three-dimensional computer graphics. Come along on the Ferraris final road test at speeds of over two hundred miles an hour where failure could be catastrophic.

programme.title: Megastructures
programme.desc: Megastructures: Astana. Worlds Most Extreme Capital City will allow our audience to become familiar with the most extreme city on Earth - Astana, capital of Kazakhstan. In Astana, the Megastructure is the whole city. The citys radical pace of development saw it transform from straw brick huts to skyscrapers in less than 20 years in one of the most extreme climatic ranges with temperatures of ?40?C in the winter rising to +40?C in the summer. No other capital on earth faces such a dramatic climate shift.

programme.title: Mysterious Islands
programme.desc: Fifty-three human remains with gunshot wounds are unearthed on an uninhabited island in Croatia. Six mysterious flying objects are spotted above Puget Sound. On the Isle of Wight, paleontologists discover the fossilized remains of a previously unknown species of dinosaur. Strange ritual artifacts uncovered in Sweden signify the religious role of the island in medieval and ancient times.

programme.title: Mysterious Islands
programme.desc: Ruins excavated on Pitcairn Island shed light on a previously unknown civilization. In the jungle of Borneo, researchers discover a strange green light in the pitch-dark forest. The remains of a long-lost temple are found decaying on the Greek island of Euboea. Coral rubble unearthed on Sudan's Suakin Island unveils the vibrant past of a marine trade center in the Red Sea.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nation's airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. programme.title: Lost Treasures of Egypt
programme.desc: Shrouded by mystery, the Lost Treasures of Egypt clears the sand away from your eyes in revealing the secrets of this Ancient Civilisation. From the Valley of Kings to the Pyramids of Giza, we uncover hidden tombs and foretell the stories of ruling pharaohs through the artefacts, that we find along the way. Following the excavations of international experts, we unearth historical context at various archaeological sites. At the end of this series, you should be enlightened with numerous Egyptian theories such as "mummification" and the 'Curse of the Afterlife'. With royalty as Tutankhamun and Cleopatra, we explore the impacts these figures had at the time and the lasting dynasty they have since left behind, for modern Egypt.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Moments after taking off from a windswept Norwegian island, the pilots of Widerøe Flight 839 hear a disturbing noise and then struggle to keep their plane level. And—after only 65 seconds in the air—their twin turboprop nosedives into the North Atlantic, killing everyone on board. In the wreckage, investigators discover damage to a critical steering component. And when they learn that another Widerøe flight nearly met the same fate at Værøy's notoriously tricky airport, they diagnose a perfect storm of controversial decisions that put lives at ris

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. programme.title: Air Crash Investigation

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: The legend of David and Goliath is one of the Bible's most famous stories. It tells of a battle between a young shepherd boy and a nine-foot-tall warrior. Now, teams of archaeologists investigate the real world behind this epic showdown. At Tel Azekah, excavators uncover the remains of an ancient city, destroyed by a devastating fire. In Egypt, inscriptions from the Temple of Karnak hint at the surprising origins of the Philistines, some of the Bible's most fearsome warriors, and at the ruined city of Gath, excavators uncover a fragment of pottery with two ancient names. Did a real Goliath live in this city?

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: For millions, Jesus is both the Son of God and an actual historical figure. But what archaeological evidence exists about the people and places that shaped his life? The investigation begins at the Church of the Holy Sepulchre in Jerusalem, said to be built upon Jesus' burial place. But there's a puzzle: In the 1st century AD, burials only took place outside the city walls, yet the church sits firmly within the Old City. Can experts solve the mystery? Elsewhere in Jerusalem, archaeologists hunt for the site where Jesus is said to have performed the miraculous healing of a Blind man — the Siloam Pool — and look for clues about the events of his final days, including the Last Supper. Beyond Jerusalem, investigators hunt for the lost town of Bethsaida, site of the feeding of five thousand and home to three of his disciples.

programme.title: No Man Left Behind
programme.desc: April, 2008. Operation Commando Wrath - a mission to take out a high-ranking leader of The Hezb-e-Islami Gulbuddin, a terrorist group with links to the Taliban. Entrenched in a mountain fortress in the impenetrable Shok Valley of Afghanistan, the top-tier target is guarded by a hoard of highly-trained, heavily-armed fighters. No coalition troops have ever reached this hostile territory before. But before they can get close, they are lured in to a deadly trap.

programme.title: No Man Left Behind
programme.desc: 27 March 1999, The Kosovan War. As night falls over Yugoslavia, an F-117 Nighthawk stealth bomber, with the call sign Vega 31. Two hours later, the target has been destroyed, but he is forced to eject after being hit by a Serb missile, pilot Dale Zelko is now falling towards enemy lines, it's only a matter of time before he's captured by the Serbs. A NATO rescue force must launch immediately to try and reach him first.

programme.title: Amsterdam Central 24/7
programme.desc: Follow the dedicated teams working tirelessly 24/7 at Amsterdam Central Station, where managing over 1,500 trains and 180,000 passengers daily is no easy feat—especially during Pride Day. When a train loses power, it's a race against time for traffic control and emergency responders. Adding to the challenge, the station is undergoing the largest renovation in its history, all while keeping to a full schedule.

programme.title: Amsterdam Central 24/7
programme.desc: Amsterdam attracts 24 million tourists every year. The capital is one of Europe's leading tourist destinations. Visitors come to Amsterdam not only for the Rijksmuseum or its 165 picturesque canals, but many also for its 165 coffeeshops. Safety & Service officers Menno and Baran assist an American tourist who has fallen ill after using soft drugs. At the Ticket & Service department, Alexandra makes a game of guessing which country travelers come from. In the Lost & Found department, staff member Gusta searches for a missing backpack belonging to an American tourist. Tourists from the United Kingdom arrive at Amsterdam Central Station by high-speed train. At the dedicated UK Terminal, the team races against the clock to ensure the train to London departs on time.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: A Homeland Security Investigations stakeout in San Diego leads to a car chase, a takedown and the discovery of nearly $500K in meth and fentanyl. In El Paso, Customs and Border Protection uncovers bundles of cash and bricks of cocaine concealed in vehicles crossing the border. And in Philadelphia, Customs and Border Protection cracks down on undeclared merchandise on international flights, uncovering thousands of dollars in suspected counterfeit goods from Turkey.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nation's airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nation's airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: Yukon Rescue
programme.desc: While the spring melt has everyone scrambling to protect Dawson City from the threat of catastrophic flooding, the fire department responds to a mysterious 911 call that puts the entire town in jeopardy. Meanwhile, two volunteer firefighters head out into the vast wilderness, but all their preparation and training are no match for the Yukon's harsh terrain. Later, the Yukon's Civil Air Search and Rescue Association faces treacherous flying conditions in its investigation of a historic missing plane, and Ray gets a call for help that takes him into the Yukon's remote backcountry.

programme.title: Yukon Rescue
programme.desc: The Dawson City Fire Department races to protect the town from devastating flash floods. In Watson Lake, while responding to emergency calls about a rogue bison herd threatening local communities and damaging vehicles, a conservation officer suspects a lone individual deep in the woods of engaging in illegal activity. Near Whitehorse, officers set up a covert sting operation to catch a serial poacher. Meanwhile, Land Guardians from the Kwanlin Dun First Nation launch an urgent investigation into illegal logging and dumping that is threatening to devastate the landscape and wildlife, while Ray and Doug attempt to help a hunter whose vehicle has broken down in the wilderness.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Moments after taking off from a windswept Norwegian island, the pilots of Widerøe Flight 839 hear a disturbing noise and then struggle to keep their plane level. And—after only 65 seconds in the air—their twin turboprop nosedives into the North Atlantic, killing everyone on board. In the wreckage, investigators discover damage to a critical steering component. And when they learn that another Widerøe flight nearly met the same fate at Værøy's notoriously tricky airport, they diagnose a perfect storm of controversial decisions that put lives at ris

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: Science of Stupid, series 8. Dallas Campbell hosts the show that combines serious science with some of the craziest, most spectacular user generated clips ever recorded. In each programme we show 40 to 50 clips of misadventure: ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes and paying the price. We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

programme.title: Land of the Iberian Lynx
programme.desc: Spring rains bring new opportunities and hope to the land of the Iberian lynx.

programme.title: Kalahari - Africa's Underground Desert
programme.desc: In the heart of southern Africa lies the Kalahari. It is an ancient desert made up of many different landscapes, with moods just as sweeping and dramatic, that is dependent on what lies beneath its surface: trillions of tons of sand and a secretive community of creatures who shape it and keep it alive. Without them, the Kalahari would slowly wither and die. But only the most ingenious, industrious and adaptable thrive here, forging clever alliances, exploiting fleeting opportunities, and pushing the limits of endurance in a world where every drop of energy — and every grain of sand — matters.

programme.title: Land of the Iberian Lynx
programme.desc: Winter. Sierra Morena is a mountain range of climatic extremes. The harsh winter puts the lynxes of the Jandula River Valley to the test. Golden eagles, otters, wild boars and cormorants struggle to survive in the land of the Iberian lynx.

programme.title: Mara: Rebirth
programme.desc: The Emergence. Part 1 of our series starts with the dust of the disappearing migration as it heads off across the river and leaves. Behind them, hundreds if not thousands of other animals cannot move because they are locked into territories.

programme.title: Mara: Rebirth
programme.desc: The Awakening. If the first episode is dusted in browns and yellows, Part 2 is green as the landscape changes and the rain turn again, rising rivers, making it difficult for everyone again, flooding, rushing waters in a raging torrent.

programme.title: Crocodile - Australia's Greatest Survivor
programme.desc: In Australia, dominant saltwater crocodiles, called ""boss crocs," are the largest and most powerful animals on the continent. Even after unrelenting human pressure on their very survival, they are still the masters of their world. Over the last 200 years, the impact of human activities—such as commercial hunting, agriculture and population growth—pushed them to the brink of extinction. Today, these "boss crocs" have continued to not only survive but thrive.

programme.title: Asia's Wild Secrets
programme.desc: Across Asia, young animals are born into a battle for survival and each day brings a new set of dangers. Macaques embark on treacherous journeys to find food. An adolescent leopard struggles while learning to hunt. Though they will grow to be apex predators, Komodo dragon hatchlings flee their cannibalistic elders. The risks are great and the reward even greater: the continuation of their species.

programme.title: Mara: Rebirth
programme.desc: The Emergence. Part 1 of our series starts with the dust of the disappearing migration as it heads off across the river and leaves. Behind them, hundreds if not thousands of other animals cannot move because they are locked into territories.

programme.title: Mara: Rebirth
programme.desc: The Awakening. If the first episode is dusted in browns and yellows, Part 2 is green as the landscape changes and the rain turn again, rising rivers, making it difficult for everyone again, flooding, rushing waters in a raging torrent.

programme.title: Crocodile - Australia's Greatest Survivor
programme.desc: In Australia, dominant saltwater crocodiles, called ""boss crocs," are the largest and most powerful animals on the continent. Even after unrelenting human pressure on their very survival, they are still the masters of their world. Over the last 200 years, the impact of human activities—such as commercial hunting, agriculture and population growth—pushed them to the brink of extinction. Today, these "boss crocs" have continued to not only survive but thrive.

programme.title: Cat Attack-Tics
programme.desc: Explore the many ways wild cats go in for the kill. Cats rarely seen in action, such as the marbled cat, the fishing cat and the sand cat, will all be featured in Cat Attack-tics. Classic Nat Geo footage is mixed with high-tech graphics, freeze frames and photo finishes to magnify the killer weaponry.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: Up Sheep's Creek. The Pol's new livestock aren't potty trained; their sheep hut isn't draining properly and has now been transformed into a Pee Palace. The winter deep freeze is just around the corner, so the family needs to get it fixed fast.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: The Pol clan gets to work on creating Beth's dream garden. To beat the incoming rainstorm, Ben works around the clock.

programme.title: Python Invasion
programme.desc: Scientists and hunters team up to fight one of the biggest ecological threats to the Florida Everglades: the Burmese python. In the 1990s, pet pythons were released into the wild and have eaten their way through the food chain. Today, nobody knows how many there are, but estimates may be in the hundreds of thousands. We follow the scientists as they track, gather data, and try to understand better how Pythons reproduce and adapt in the Everglades. Ian Bartoszerk and his team at the Conservancy of Southwest Florida use male scout snakes to lead them to females with the potential to lay up to eighty eggs at a time. At the U.S.G.S., Amy Yackle and Mark Sandfoss work in tandem with wildlife biologists from the National Park Service and the University of Florida to battle female reproduction on another front — Alligator Alley.

programme.title: Ultimate Predators
programme.desc: Join us in our exploration of four of nature's deadliest animals: vipers, crocodiles, bears and sharks. Let's find out how they kill, what their abilities are and which one of them is the most deserving of the title - the ultimate predator.

programme.title: Cat Attack-Tics
programme.desc: Explore the many ways wild cats go in for the kill. Cats rarely seen in action, such as the marbled cat, the fishing cat and the sand cat, will all be featured in Cat Attack-tics. Classic Nat Geo footage is mixed with high-tech graphics, freeze frames and photo finishes to magnify the killer weaponry.

programme.desc: Join us in our exploration of four of nature's deadliest animals: vipers, crocodiles, bears and sharks. Let's find out how they kill, what their abilities are and which one of them is the most deserving of the title - the ultimate predator.

programme.title: Ultimate Predators
programme.desc: Join us in our exploration of four of nature's deadliest animals: vipers, crocodiles, bears and sharks. Let's find out how they kill, what their abilities are and which one of them is the most deserving of the title - the ultimate predator.

programme.title: Ultimate Predators
programme.desc: Join us in our exploration of four of nature's deadliest animals: vipers, crocodiles, bears and sharks. Let's find out how they kill, what their abilities are and which one of them is the most deserving of the title - the ultimate predator.

programme.title: Cat Attack-Tics

Classic Nat Geo footage is mixed with high-tech graphics, freeze frames and photo finishes to magnify the killer weaponry.

programme.title: Serengeti Speed Queen
programme.desc: Nzuri is the Speed Queen of the Serengeti - but being fast isn't enough. She's constantly bullied by hyenas on the grassland and hunted by lions in the marsh. When two of her cubs are killed, the family is exiled to the transition forest. There, she learns to adapt her hunting methods and adds strategy to speed in order to outwit her enemies and steer her remaining cubs successfully to adulthood.

programme.title: Cat Wars: Lion vs Cheetah
programme.desc: Caught on tape in Africa's wild Serengeti is a stunning act of violence between two top predators. Three cheetahs are brutally attacked by two male lions - the first time an attack like this has ever been filmed. Now, filmmaker Leo Kuenkel, who witnessed the attack, is trying to make sense of it. Was this a once-in-a-lifetime "perfect storm" event? Or do these iconic African cats have a deep-set, sinister reason to fight to the death?

programme.title: Venom Files - Anatomy of a Snake Bite
programme.desc: Millions are bitten by snakes each year, yet their venom evolved for hunting, not harming humans. Explore the fascinating and deadly adaptations of the king cobra, black mamba, inland taipan, puff adder, saw-scaled viper, Mozambique spitting cobra and the fearsome boomslang. Journey from India's vibrant villages to Africa's wild bush and Australia's outback to witness how venom paralyzes, digests and protects. Discover why every snakebite is different — and how our worlds collide in surprising ways. Each snake's venom tells a story, engineered to hunt, defend and survive. But as humans and snakes collide, the chemistry that once kept balance now brings catastrophe. "Venom Files" reveals nature's deadliest assassins.

programme.title: Python Invasion
programme.desc: Scientists and hunters team up to fight one of the biggest ecological threats to the Florida Everglades: the Burmese python. In the 1990s, pet pythons were released into the wild and have eaten their way through the food chain. Today, nobody knows how many there are, but estimates may be in the hundreds of thousands. At the U.S.G.S., Amy Yackle and Mark Sandfoss work in tandem with wildlife biologists from the National Park Service and the University of Florida to battle female reproduction on another front — Alligator Alley.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: With more than 19,000 patients, Dr. Pol has seen it all. Specializing in large farm animals, this senior is anything but retiring as he takes an old-school, non-nonsense approach to veterinary medicine. Unflappable and unstoppable, this doc routinely puts in 14-hour days and is a legend in his community. This new series travels with him across rural Michigan to care for every family pet and head of livestock in need of his expertise and kindness.

programme.title: Leopard & Hyena: Strange Alliance
programme.desc: After an explosive chance encounter, a lone male hyena and a female leopard join forces, and an unconventional hunting partnership blossoms.

programme.title: Eye of the Leopard
programme.desc: National Geographic filmmakers Dereck and Beverly Joubert set out to create a film on leopards but never imagined they would be seduced by a small, eight-day-old cub named Legadema. Eye of the Leopard follows Legadema's journey from a playful cub to a skilled huntress. Narrated by Jeremy Irons.

programme.title: Leopard Kingdom
programme.desc: Karula, the Queen of Djuma, reigned over South Africas Sabi Sand for over a decade. But now, the queen is gone. Her offspring now hope to claim the land that was once hers.

programme.title: Leopard & Hyena: Strange Alliance
programme.desc: After an explosive chance encounter, a lone male hyena and a female leopard join forces, and an unconventional hunting partnership blossoms.

programme.title: Wild Lapland
programme.desc: A lyrical portrayal of the enchanting, wild creatures who call Lapland home.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: Winter is Coming. The Pols rush to prepare for their farm's first Michigan winter. The family goes into hyperdrive to fix the pasture fence and finish building the garden hardscape before the first snow falls.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: Runaway Flock. It's winter on the farm, and the Pol's are adding to their flock! The family is bringing in four merino ewes that were recently bred, which means with any luck the farm could be expecting its first lambs come springtime.

programme.title: Cat Attack-Tics
programme.desc: Explore the many ways wild cats go in for the kill. Cats rarely seen in action, such as the marbled cat, the fishing cat and the sand cat, will all be featured in Cat Attack-tics. Classic Nat Geo footage is mixed with high-tech graphics, freeze frames and photo finishes to magnify the killer weaponry.

programme.title: Snakes in the City
programme.desc: Catching the world's deadliest snakes is no problem for Simon Keys and his partner Siouxsie Gillett, who round up Durban's ever-growing population of street snakes. With the summer heat enticing the snakes into the city, it's the duo's job to safely catch the slithering creatures and release them safely back into the wild. Entering homes, offices and even factories, the reclusive reptiles seek to find shelter in places you wouldn't think likely. From black mambas to cobras, Simon and Siouxsie have their work cut out as they race to help the residents of Durban stay safe from a potentially lethal snakebite.

programme.title: Wild Lapland
programme.desc: A lyrical portrayal of the enchanting, wild creatures who call Lapland home.

programme.title: Valley of the Wolves
programme.desc: Imagine a place that holds everything you've ever wanted. High slopes and good timber for cover and den sites. Water. Your very own herds to hunt and all the wide open space you need for the chase. But others of your kind also want this place. They will challenge you for it. How far will you go to defend it? In the northeast corner of Yellowstone, the wolves of the Druid Peak Pack have long held sway, but their power is waning. The old leaders of the clan cannot stand against the challenge of the invading Slough Creek Pack. But the conquering wolves will find this no safe haven. Here, they will meet a strange and terrible fate. And though in exile, the Druids will rebuild their clan and gather the strength to return. In this beautiful but dangerous place, there is bounty and cruelty, loyalty and banishment, triumph and death. This is the story of the battle for the perfect valley and the high price wolves will pay for paradise.

programme.title: Kingdom of the Apes: Battle Lines
programme.desc: Deep in the jungles of Africa, chimpanzees and gorillas, are living out epic dramas: warriors battle, kings fall, and battle lines are drawn. These unique, character-driven stories will touch your heart and blow your mind.

programme.title: Snow School
programme.desc: National Geographic Wild. When every day is a snow day, school is always in session! Snowy climates can make for harsh living, and adulting is hard no matter where you are, but these young are flourishing.

programme.title: Killer Safari
programme.desc: Crocodiles rule Africa's waters: stealthy, deadly, and unstoppable. Watch them face lions, cheetahs, and buffalo in explosive encounters.

programme.title: Killer Safari
programme.desc: When the savannah turns into a battleground, it's hard to choose a hero. We're on the edge of our safari seats as a leopard is cornered by a pride of lions, a young impala is hurled into the air by a hippo and two hyenas try to drown each other. Then, the rarest of sightings as an Aardvark runs for its life from a brown hyaena. Who will win when it's tooth versus claw?

From black mambas to cobras, Simon and Siouxsie have their work cut out as they race to help the residents of Durban stay safe from a potentially lethal snakebite.

programme.title: Cat Attack-Tics
programme.desc: Explore the many ways wild cats go in for the kill. Cats rarely seen in action, such as the marbled cat, the fishing cat and the sand cat, will all be featured in Cat Attack-tics. Classic Nat Geo footage is mixed with high-tech graphics, freeze frames and photo finishes to magnify the killer weaponry.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabo aizmirsa nodot bibliotēkas grāmatu. Bibliotekārs Misters Stingrais šodien ciemojas pie Barbatēta, tāpēc Barbabo izlemj aizbēgt. Barbamamma grib, lai barbabērni uzkopj savas istabas. Viņi slēpjas, lai izvairītos no garlaicīgā darba.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Slēpošanas laikā Barbapapas uzceļ milzīgu iglū. Barbabravo and Barbalibs sacenšas drosmīgumā. Barbagudrais rada putekļu sūkšanas robotu, kas lieliski spēlē futbolu. Barbabērni sarīko spēli pret robotiem.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbagudrais pārklāj māju ar burvju produktu, lai novērstu ūdens sūci. Nākamajā dienā māja saplok kā balons. Putns uzvij ligzdu uz Barbazū vēdera. Barbazū grib kļūt par lieu koku, lai sniegtu patvērumu dzīvniekiem. Situācija kļūst sarežģīta.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Kādus sapņus sasniegtu, ja es būtu miljardieris?

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Trenere Karima lūdz uzbūvēt zāli vingrošanas šovam. Izrādās, ka Lilijai baļķis ir par augstu. Jādomā risinājums! Kad ceļojošais šovs netiek līdz Celtnieklīcim, kucēni rīko paši savu šovu.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Čārdžeram ir problēma - viņam ir pārāk daudz enerģijas, lai gulētu! Rablam kā allaž padomā risinājums! Rabls ar biedriem un Liliju uzbūvē stilīgāko rotaļu laukumu.

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Ķepu patruļa" ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. Viņiem ir unikālas problēmu risināšanas spējas, stilīgi braucamrīki un daudz kucēniem raksturīga mīļa humora. "Kepu patruļa" dodas bīstamās glābšanas misijās, lai Piedzīvojumu līča iedzīvotāji būtu drošībā. Māršals – suns ugunsdzējs, Čeiss – suns policists, Skaja, kura lido savā helikopterā, un citi – katram kucēnam ir sava īpaša personība un spējas, atspoguļojot kopīga darba un pilsoniskās atbildības nozīmību. Viņiem visiem uz muguras ir īpašas mugursomas, lai viņi būtu spējīgi paveikt visu, sākot no kaķēnu glābšanas līdz vilciena apturēšanai, neļaujot tam nokrist no klints. Lai cik liels būtu piedzīvojums, "Ķepu patruļai" vienmēr atliek laiks spēlēm, jautrībai un tam, lai Raiders pakasa aiz auss. Interesants "Ķepu patruļas" fakts – Raders izglāba visus kucēnus un iemācīja tiem viņu spējas.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbatētis un Barbamamma svin savas dzimšanas dienas. Barbabellai darba pilnas rokas, pieskatot pārējos. Barbabella pieskata Bali kaķēnus. Viņa baidās, kaut kas var noiet greizi, tāpēc nelaiž tos ārā. Barbamammai jāpalīdz kaķēniem.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Ķīmiskas villas padara lauku apvidu rožainu. Barbapapas uzbūvē putnu māju, lai pasargātu sasirgušos putnus. Ieraugot piesārņotu pludmali, Barbapapu ģimene izlemj to uzkopt. No drazām top mini golfa laukums.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims, Tomijs un Tija apmaldās izklaides centrā. Tims meklē jaunu, sev piemērotu raķeti. Kad Terija pieskata bērnus, Tims cenšas apiet visus noteikumus.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Gabriels rīko Talantu šovu, taču Ātrummeistars izdomā plānu, lai viņš būtu vienīgais dalībnieks. Cetnieklīča svētkos dziedās Sjerra Spīdošā, un vajadzīgi jauni instrumenti.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Ar steigu jāuzbūvē liels dambis, kas pilsētu pasargās no plūdiem Fermeri Zoju piemeklē likstas - ražu apēd neatlaidīga vāvere.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora, Zābaciņš un Karte palīdz tēvocim Tesoro atrast pazaudētos dārgumu pēddziņus un atkal kļūt par dārgumu karti. Dora un Zābaciņš pēta noslēpumainu atslēgu, lai iepazītu Doras vecvecvecmāmiņu - pašu pirmo zinātkāro pētnieci.

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri
programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī. Asupilī nav lielākas zvaigznes par Bleizu. Viņš ir čempions sacīkšu trasē un varonis ārpus tās. Kad vien ir kāda ķibele, visi vēršas pie viņa, jo zina, ka Bleizs spēj to, ko nespēj citas mašīnas. Viņš ir ātrākais automonstrs pilsētā - viņam piemīt bliezienātrums! Liekot lietā savas zināšanas, Bleizs spēj tikt galā ar jebkādu izaicinājumu. Ja situācija kļūst sarežģīta, viņš spēj iztēloties sevi par jebkuru mašīnu, pārvērsties par to un pavisam viegli atrisināt ikvienu problēmu.

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa
programme.desc: Cūciņa Pepa ir mīļa, ziņkārīga un aktīva pirmskolniece, kura kopā ar māmiņu, tēti un brālīti Džordžu ik dienu uzzina daudz ko jaunu un aizraujošu. Pepas iecienītākās nodarbes ir rotaļāšanās, pārģērbšanās un lēkāšana pa dubļainām peļķēm, un viņas jautrie piedzīvojumi vienmēr beidzas ar skaļiem smieklu rukšķiem.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims cenšas dabūt lejā Tijas jauno balonu, kas ieķēries kokā.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims, Tomijs un Tija nevar izlemt, ko dāvināt omītei.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims uzņem pats savu Kapteiņa Dinozvaigznes filmu.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Jauni piedzīvojumi ar DORU! Pievienojies drošajai pasaules pētītājai Dorai un viņas labākajam draugam Zābaciņam viņu kopīgajos ceļojumos pa maģisko lietusmežu, kurā var notikt - un notiek - brīnumu lietas. Let's go!

programme.title: Bena un Hollijas mazā karaļvalsts
programme.desc: Mazā karaļvalsts varbūt nav varen milzīga, taču tā ir ļoti maģiska. Un, kā katrā kārtīgā karaļvalstī pieklājas, tai ir savs karalis un karaliene, kas dzīvo pilī kopā ar trim meitām: astoņgadīgo Holiju un mazajām dvīnēm Deiziju un Popiju. Savukārt elfi mīt Lielajā elfu kokā, kur it viss ir vienuviet: skola, bibliotēka, daudzdzīvokļu nams un pat rotaļlietu un burvju nūjiņu fabrika. Šis koks ir mājvieta arī elfiņam Benam, pasaku princeses Holijas neparastajam draugam. Abi kopā viņi nemitīgi iekuļas jautros piedzīvojumos, mācoties kopīgi sadarboties, dalīties un risināt sarežģītas situācijas.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabravo nespēj nosēdēt mierā un ilgi koncentrēties vienai nodarbei. Barbalala piedāvā iemācīt viņam kontroli. Vai viņai izdosies?

programme.title: Krokodila kungs
programme.desc: Kad Vinstons atsakās spēlēties ar Lidiju, Deizija un Krokodilkungs rada viņai iedomu draugu. Krokodilkungs palīdz Deizijai pieskatīt Martina zivi, taču baidās, ka nespēs noturēties un apēdīs to.

programme.title: Rabla komanda

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kad Ātrmeistara izdomājums cieš neveiksmi, Rabls ar komandu uzbūvē lielāku un drošāku atrakciju.

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Ķepu patruļa" ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni - Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. Viņiem ir unikālas problēmu risināšanas spējas, stilīgi braucamrīki un daudz kucēniem raksturīga mīļa humora. "Kepu patruļa" dodas bīstamās glābšanas misijās, lai Piedzīvojumu līča iedzīvotāji būtu drošībā. Māršals - suns ugunsdzējs, Čeiss - suns policists, Skaja, kura lido savā helikopterā, un citi - katram kucēnam ir sava īpaša personība un spējas, atspoguļojot kopīga darba un pilsoniskās atbildības nozīmību. Viņiem visiem uz muguras ir īpašas mugursomas, lai viņi būtu spējīgi paveikt visu - sākot no kaķēnu glābšanas līdz vilciena apturēšanai, neļaujot tam nokrist no klints. Lai cik liels būtu piedzīvojums, "Ķepu patruļai" vienmēr atliek laiks spēlēm, jautrībai un tam, lai Raiders pakasa aiz auss. Interesants "Ķepu patruļas" fakts - Raders izglāba visus kucēnus un iemācīja tiem viņu spējas.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbagudrais pastāsta pārējiem, cik vareni bija Da Vinči izgudrojumi un nu katrs grib izgudrot ko savu. Ģēniju ir maz, bet ir jautri izgudrot. // Bērniem jāizvēlas - doties baseinā vai izbraukt ar riteņiem. Uzreiz izveidojas divas frontes un tikai Barbazū spēj nosvērt izvēles svarus.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabērni grib izgudrot, kā Da Vinči.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims, Tomijs un Tija nevar izlemt, ko dāvināt omītei. Tims uzņem pats savu Kapteiņa Dinozvaigznes filmu. Tims izliekas, lai pierādītu, ka ir tikpat foršs, cik Kajas brālēns.

programme.title: Ķepaiņu lietas
programme.desc: Antropomorfisku dzīvnieku pasaulē Sems Snovs un Kita Keisija ir elitāri KLEID (Slepenā dzīvnieku detektīvu ekspertu līga) aģenti, kas apceļo pasauli un risina noslēpumus, liekot lietā problēmu risināšanas un dzīvnieku faktu pārzināšanas prasmes.

programme.title: Briežu komanda
programme.desc: Sers Tērauds burā bīstama ūdenskrituma virzienā, to nemaz nemanot, jo ir pārāk aizņemts ar meditāciju. Urbjdegunu vaboles iznīcina mežu, tāpēc diviem noslēpumainiem varoņiem jāatklāj savas identitātes.

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa
programme.desc: Pastnieks Zebra palīdz savai meitai Zojai. Zojai ir īpaša vēstule Pepai un Džordžam - ielūgums uz viņas dzimšanas dienas ballīti. Ballīte ir jautri, īpaši tad, kad izrādās, ka Zoja ielūgusi visus Pepas un Džordža draugus.

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa
programme.desc: Cūciņa Pepa ir mīļa, ziņkārīga un aktīva pirmskolniece, kura kopā ar māmiņu, tēti un brālīti Džordžu ik dienu uzzina daudz ko jaunu un aizraujošu. Pepas iecienītākās nodarbes ir rotaļāšanās, pārģērbšanās un lēkāšana pa dubļainām peļķēm, un viņas jautrie piedzīvojumi vienmēr beidzas ar skaļiem smieklu rukšķiem.

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa
programme.desc: Tētis uzvelk veco dzeguzes pulksteni. Kad koka dzeguze sāk dziedāt, Pepa domā, ka tas ir ļoti jautri, bet Džordžs to neredzēja. Džordžs negrib to vēlreiz palaist garām, bet dzeguze parādās tikai reizi stundā.

programme.title: Bena un Hollijas mazā karaļvalsts
programme.desc: Mazā karaļvalsts varbūt nav varen milzīga, taču tā ir ļoti maģiska. Un, kā katrā kārtīgā karaļvalstī pieklājas, tai ir savs karalis un karaliene, kas dzīvo pilī kopā ar trim meitām: astoņgadīgo Holiju un mazajām dvīnēm Deiziju un Popiju. Savukārt elfi mīt Lielajā elfu kokā, kur it viss ir vienuviet: skola, bibliotēka, daudzdzīvokļu nams un pat rotaļlietu un burvju nūjiņu fabrika. Šis koks ir mājvieta arī elfiņam Benam, pasaku princeses Holijas neparastajam draugam. Abi kopā viņi nemitīgi iekuļas jautros piedzīvojumos, mācoties kopīgi sadarboties, dalīties un risināt sarežģītas situācijas.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Ar steigu jāuzbūvē liels dambis, kas pilsētu pasargās no plūdiem Fermeri Zoju piemeklē likstas - ražu apēd neatlaidīga vāvere.

programme.title: Krokodila kungs
programme.desc: Krokodilkungs baidās, ka tiks spiests izvēlēties starp senu labāko draugu Bazziju un jaunu labāko draudzeni Deiziju. Deizijas un Krokodilkunga vienkāršā mājiņa kokā tiek sarežģīta, kad viņi cenšas to paplašināt draugu dēļ.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabo, Barbabella un Barbagudrais uzbūvē māju kokā. Barbamamma ir apņēmusies novērst piesārņojumu.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims, Tomijs un Tija atrod pazudušu rotaļlietu un sola atgriezt to saimniekam. Kaja gaida, kad brauks ar Nebulatoru, bet Tims nav drošs. Tims un Kaja cenšas nofotografēt maldinošu Kosmosa vaboli.

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa
programme.desc: Cūciņa Pepa ir mīļa, ziņkārīga un aktīva pirmskolniece, kura kopā ar māmiņu, tēti un brālīti Džordžu ik dienu uzzina daudz ko jaunu un aizraujošu. programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbazū gatavs palīdzēt, bet Barbagudrais un Barbabella ļaunprātīgi izmanto viņa labestību un padara viņu traku. Barbazū nejauši atklāj spēju atdarināt Barbatēti. Viņš to izmanto, lai sadalītu darbus brāļiem un māsām. Vai viņi to uzzinās?

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbatētis uzņem uz klāja Barbabamu, lai atrastu lielkāja mājas.

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri
programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī. Asupilī nav lielākas zvaigznes par Bleizu. Viņš ir čempions sacīkšu trasē un varonis ārpus tās. Kad vien ir kāda ķibele, visi vēršas pie viņa, jo zina, ka Bleizs spēj to, ko nespēj citas mašīnas. Viņš ir ātrākais automonstrs pilsētā - viņam piemīt bliezienātrums! Liekot lietā savas zināšanas, Bleizs spēj tikt galā ar jebkādu izaicinājumu. Ja situācija kļūst sarežģīta, viņš spēj iztēloties sevi par jebkuru mašīnu, pārvērsties par to un pavisam viegli atrisināt ikvienu problēmu.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Pēc tam, kad Ātrmeistars uzbūvējis nedrošu rotaļlaukumu, Rabla komandai jādomā radoši un jāuzbūvē jauns laukums no veciem materiāliem. Pilsētas Čili Kūkarū ir apdraudēts, kad sāk iebrukt Rātsnama jumts! Par laimi suņi zina, kā to salabot.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kad ģimene pa Ātrmeistara ceļu nevar pagūt uz lidostu, Rabla komandai līdz izlidošanai jāuzbūvē jauns ceļš.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbatētis un Barbamamma svin savas dzimšanas dienas. Barbabellai darba pilnas rokas, pieskatot pārējos. Barbabella pieskata Bali kaķēnus. Viņa baidās, kaut kas var noiet greizi, tāpēc nelaiž tos ārā. Barbamammai jāpalīdz kaķēniem.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Ķīmiskas villas padara lauku apvidu rožainu. Barbapapas uzbūvē putnu māju, lai pasargātu sasirgušos putnus. Ieraugot piesārņotu pludmali, Barbapapu ģimene izlemj to uzkopt. No drazām top mini golfa laukums.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Ceļā uz Parīzi Barbapapas atklāj vislabāko muzeju - Luvru!

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Karls atver smūtiju kafejnīcu. Kad sākas kokosriekstu haoss, palīgā steidz Rabla komanda. Rabls ar komandu strādā pie tā, lai izglābtu Čārdžera dzimšanas dienas ballīti!

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kucēni Gabrielam vēlas sarīkot lielisku pludmales dienu, ieskaitot braucienu ar panorāmas ratu! Tā kā fermeres Zojas lopiņiem jāatpūšas, kucēni uzbūvē vietu jogas nodarbībām.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabo neprot zīmēt. Viņam piemetas žagas, no kurām netiek vaļā. Viņš jau grasās padoties, kad nejauši rada jaunu mākslas novirzienu. Barbaliba grib piedalīties rakstīšanas konkursā, taču brāļi un māsas neļauj koncentrēties.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims, Tomijs, Tija un omīte ir dārgumu meklējumos. Ir Rūkoņas svētki, un Tims grib, lai viņa rūciens ir labākais. Tims, Tomijs un Tija savā mājā atrod pazudušu mamutu.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Rabla komandai jāizdekorē Sjerras Spīdošās skatuve, koncerts izvēršas neticams Bodnieks Gabriels rīko savu gardumu izstādi, un Rabla komanda dodas palīgā.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Rabla komanda būvē autosstāvietu saldējuma kafejnīcas klientiem. Rouza rīko kempingu, bet Rabls baidās no tumsas. Draugi uzbūvē zvaigznes.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora palīdz pelēnam Peresam salabot burvju zobu suku, lai varētu saņemt dāvanu par savu izkritušo zobu. Dora iepazīstas ar kāpuru Karlosu, kurš vēlas kļūt pr tauriņu! Lai tas notiktu, draugiem viņam jāatrod sviestogu cienasts.

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri
programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī. Asupilī nav lielākas zvaigznes par Bleizu. Viņš ir čempions sacīkšu trasē un varonis ārpus tās. Kad vien ir kāda ķibele, visi vēršas pie viņa, jo zina, ka Bleizs spēj to, ko nespēj citas mašīnas. Viņš ir ātrākais automonstrs pilsētā - viņam piemīt bliezienātrums! Liekot lietā savas zināšanas, Bleizs spēj tikt galā ar jebkādu izaicinājumu. Ja situācija kļūst sarežģīta, viņš spēj iztēloties sevi par jebkuru mašīnu, pārvērsties par to un pavisam viegli atrisināt ikvienu problēmu.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabravo kā slepenais aģents vada izmeklēšanu, bruņojies ar saviem rīkiem, lai uzzinātu, kurš nozaga Barbatēta torti. Barbalala ir pārliecināta, ka dzirdēja milzu vistu klīstam pa māju. Barbabērni stāv sardzē.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabērni sagatavo izrādi Barbamammai dzimšanas dienā. Kamēr Barbalala uzkopj, viņi sodas uz lunaparku, kur Barbabo iesprūst karuselī. Trīs atsevišķi stāsti saplūst kopā pagalma vidū.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims, Tomijs, Tija un omīte ir dārgumu meklējumos. Ir Rūkoņas svētki, un Tims grib, lai viņa rūciens ir labākais. Tims, Tomijs un Tija savā mājā atrod pazudušu mamutu.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kad komanda uzbūvē īpašu limonādes stendu Lūkasam un Lilija, īgnais Ātrmeistars ieripina to Celtnieklīča ielās. Kāpēc bebrs Krančijs šķērso ceļu? Jo Rabla komanda būvē tiltu, lai palīdzētu viņam nokļūt ceļa otrā pusē.

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Ķepu patruļa" ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni - Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. Viņiem ir unikālas problēmu risināšanas spējas, stilīgi braucamrīki un daudz kucēniem raksturīga mīļa humora. "Kepu patruļa" dodas bīstamās glābšanas misijās, lai Piedzīvojumu līča iedzīvotāji būtu drošībā. Māršals - suns ugunsdzējs,

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa
programme.desc: Cūciņa Pepa ir mīļa, ziņkārīga un aktīva pirmskolniece, kura kopā ar māmiņu, tēti un brālīti Džordžu ik dienu uzzina daudz ko jaunu un aizraujošu. Pepas iecienītākās nodarbes ir rotaļāšanās, pārģērbšanās un lēkāšana pa dubļainām peļķēm, un viņas jautrie piedzīvojumi vienmēr beidzas ar skaļiem smieklu rukšķiem.

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa
programme.desc: Pepa un Džordžs dodas uz rotaļlaukumu. Tur ir arī Pepas draugi. Pepai patīk šūpoties, bet Džordžam ne, jo viņš baidās no augstuma. Tāpēc tētis palīdz Džordžam nošļūkt no kalniņa. Tas ir par augstu, un viņš iesprūst.

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa
programme.desc: Cūciņa Pepa ir mīļa, ziņkārīga un aktīva pirmskolniece, kura kopā ar māmiņu, tēti un brālīti Džordžu ik dienu uzzina daudz ko jaunu un aizraujošu. programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims izliekas, lai pierādītu, ka ir tikpat foršs, cik Kajas brālēns.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tomijs piedalās raķešu sacīkstēs, Tims atbalsta savu brāli.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims novērš Tijas domas no Taskija, kamēr tas mazgājas veļas mašīnā.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora un Zābaciņš atrod Doras pazudušo dzimšanas dienas torti, un visa ģimene sarīko viņai pārsteiguma ballīti! Dora un Zābaciņš palīdz Mēnesnīcai atrast Mēnesspuķi, lai visi varētu priecāties Mēnessgaismas fiestā.

programme.title: Bena un Hollijas mazā karaļvalsts
programme.desc: Mazā karaļvalsts varbūt nav varen milzīga, taču tā ir ļoti maģiska. Un, kā katrā kārtīgā karaļvalstī pieklājas, tai ir savs karalis un karaliene, kas dzīvo pilī kopā ar trim meitām: astoņgadīgo Holiju un mazajām dvīnēm Deiziju un Popiju. Savukārt elfi mīt Lielajā elfu kokā, kur it viss ir vienuviet: skola, bibliotēka, daudzdzīvokļu nams un pat rotaļlietu un burvju nūjiņu fabrika. Šis koks ir mājvieta arī elfiņam Benam, pasaku princeses Holijas neparastajam draugam. Abi kopā viņi nemitīgi iekuļas jautros piedzīvojumos, mācoties kopīgi sadarboties, dalīties un risināt sarežģītas situācijas.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Slēpošanas laikā Barbapapas uzceļ milzīgu iglū. Barbabravo and Barbalibs sacenšas drosmīgumā. Barbagudrais rada putekļu sūkšanas robotu, kas lieliski spēlē futbolu. Barbabērni sarīko spēli pret robotiem.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabērni domā, ka ēdiens spēj likt tiem mainīt krāsu un formu, tāpēc izlemj atrast katram piemēroto ēdienu.

programme.title: Krokodila kungs
programme.desc: Kad Deizija noskrāpē ceļgalu, mācoties braukt ar skrituļdēli, Krokodilkungs cenšas nepieļaut, ka viņa iegūst vēl kādu sāpīti. Krokodilkungs un Deizija sacenšas ar Vinstonu futbola mačā.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kad Karla pirātu tematikas restorāns nonāk vētrainos ūdeņos, kucēni dodas jūrā ar jaunu būvniecības risinājumu. // Sjerra Spīdošā lūdz Rabla komandas palīdzību, lai Celtnieklīcī uzbūvētu īpašu piedzīvojumu visiem saviem faniem.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Būvētavā inspekcijas diena. Taču Motorei sanāk "bum". Vai kucēni mācēs visu labot?

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Ķepu patruļa" ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni - Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. Viņiem ir unikālas problēmu risināšanas spējas, stilīgi braucamrīki un daudz kucēniem raksturīga mīļa humora. "Kepu patruļa" dodas bīstamās glābšanas misijās, lai Piedzīvojumu līča iedzīvotāji būtu drošībā. Māršals - suns ugunsdzējs, Čeiss - suns policists, Skaja, kura lido savā helikopterā, un citi - katram kucēnam ir sava īpaša personība un spējas, atspoguļojot kopīga darba un pilsoniskās atbildības nozīmību. Viņiem visiem uz muguras ir īpašas mugursomas, lai viņi būtu spējīgi paveikt visu - sākot no kaķēnu glābšanas līdz vilciena apturēšanai, neļaujot tam nokrist no klints. Lai cik liels būtu piedzīvojums, "Ķepu patruļai" vienmēr atliek laiks spēlēm, jautrībai un tam, lai Raiders pakasa aiz auss. Interesants "Ķepu patruļas" fakts - Raders izglāba visus kucēnus un iemācīja tiem viņu spējas.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabērniem patīk nakts pasaciņas, bet ne tad, ja tās visu laiku atkārtojas. Barbabella pavada nemierīgu nakti kukaiņu dēļ.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Bērniem jāizlemj - doties baseinā vai izbraucienā ar riteņiem.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tomijs piedalās raķešu sacīkstēs, Tims atbalsta savu brāli. Tims novērš Tijas domas no Taskija, kamēr tas mazgājas veļas mašīnā. Bērni kļūst par vecākiem, un vecāki - par bērniem.

programme.title: Ķepaiņu lietas
programme.desc: Antropomorfisku dzīvnieku pasaulē Sems Snovs un Kita Keisija ir elitāri KLEID (Slepenā dzīvnieku detektīvu ekspertu līga) aģenti, kas apceļo pasauli un risina noslēpumus, liekot lietā problēmu risināšanas un dzīvnieku faktu pārzināšanas prasmes.

programme.title: Briežu komanda
programme.desc: Mūsu varoņi ir atpakaļ, un šoreiz Briežu komanda pametīs šīs pasaules robežas! Gatavojies varonīgai planētas glābšanai ar dažādiem uzlabojumiem, jauniem tēliem, foršām lietām un satriecošiem piedzīvojumiem kosmosā!

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa
programme.desc: Cūciņa Pepa ir mīļa, ziņkārīga un aktīva pirmskolniece, kura kopā ar māmiņu, tēti un brālīti Džordžu ik dienu uzzina daudz ko jaunu un aizraujošu. Pepas iecienītākās nodarbes ir rotaļāšanās, pārģērbšanās un lēkāšana pa dubļainām peļķēm, un viņas jautrie piedzīvojumi vienmēr beidzas ar skaļiem smieklu rukšķiem.

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa
programme.desc: Pepa un Džordžs ir pie zobārsta. Dakteris Zilonis saka, ka Pepas un Džordža zobi ir tīri un jauki. Bet Džordža dinozauriņa zobi ir dzeltenīgi. Dakteris Zilonis pulē dinozaura zobus, līdz tie kļūst spīdīgi.

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa
programme.desc: Cūciņa Pepa ir mīļa, ziņkārīga un aktīva pirmskolniece, kura kopā ar māmiņu, tēti un brālīti Džordžu ik dienu uzzina daudz ko jaunu un aizraujošu. programme.title: Bena un Hollijas mazā karaļvalsts
programme.desc: Mazā karaļvalsts varbūt nav varen milzīga, taču tā ir ļoti maģiska. programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Dullo vecāku" galvenais varonis ir desmit gadus vecs zēns Timijs, kurš dzīvo izdomātā pilsētā Dimsdeilā, un tur viņam neklājas viegli. Timija dzīve ir bēdīga, jo vecāki reti kad ir mājās, viņu pieskata Vikija, 16 gadus veca ļauna auklīte, viņš pastāvīgi tiek apsmiets, viņu moka arī skolotājs Krokera kungs. Bet viss mainās, kad viņam uzrodas divi laumiņu krustvecāki - Kosmo, viņa sieva Vanda un vēlāk - viņu dēls Pufs. Timijs apjauš, ka laumiņu krustvecāki noteiktās robežās spēj piepildīt visas viņa vēlēšanās. Tomēr Timijs vēl ir maziņš un reizēm ievēlas ko tādu, kas netīši noved pie nepatikšanām.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Rabla komandai jāizdekorē Sjerras Spīdošās skatuve, koncerts izvēršas neticams Bodnieks Gabriels rīko savu gardumu izstādi, un Rabla komanda dodas palīgā.

programme.title: Krokodila kungs
programme.desc: Kad Krokodilkungam izkrīt zobs, Deizija grib būt droša, ka viņu apciemos zobu feja. Krokodilkungam, Deizijai un draugiem bail paņemt Martina cimdus no spokainā šķūņa.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbalala saņem paciņu ar rozā zvēriņiem, ko nosauc par Skvīkijiem. Barbabravo, Barbalala un Barbabo ir apnicis, ka brāļi un māsas par viņiem smejas.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims, Tomijs un Tija apmaldās izklaides centrā. Tims meklē jaunu, sev piemērotu raķeti. Kad Terija pieskata bērnus, Tims cenšas apiet visus noteikumus.

programme.desc: Cūciņa Pepa ir mīļa, ziņkārīga un aktīva pirmskolniece, kura kopā ar māmiņu, tēti un brālīti Džordžu ik dienu uzzina daudz ko jaunu un aizraujošu. Savukārt elfi mīt Lielajā elfu kokā, kur it viss ir vienuviet: skola, bibliotēka, daudzdzīvokļu nams un pat rotaļlietu un burvju nūjiņu fabrika.
